Amphibious.name: Amphibious
Amphibious.description: This creature can breath underwater in addition to air.

Telepathy.name: Telepathy
Telepathy.description: The Creature can communicate telepathically with other creatures it can see.

Tail Sweep.name: Tail Sweep
Tail Sweep.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} can whip its heavy tail across the battlefield with terrible force.

Tail Sweep.name: Tail Sweep
Tail Sweep.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} sweeps its heavy tail in a circular arc, striking all creatures within range. On a Critical Hit, affected targets become @Condition[staggered] for until the end of their next turn.

Rune: Control.name: Rune: Control
Rune: Control.description:
The orderly force of discipline and permanence. The Control rune governs thought, reason, and persistence.

The Control rune scales using Wisdom, targets Willpower, and deals Psychic damage to Morale. It is opposed by the chaotic rune of Kinesis.

Motivate.name: Motivate
Motivate.description:
Your command of the Rune of Control allows you to affect the decision making of others in basic ways, producing one of the following effects:

  • Moderately intensify or dampen the primary emotion being felt by a creature you touch. If the creature is intelligent enough to be aware of the laws governing spellcraft, they are aware of your actions.

  • Understand the abstract motivations of another living creature which allows you to touch it. You are able to intuit their immediate goals expressed in the form of a single verb.

  • Intensely focus on your current objective and the means of achieving it. You receive a brief hint or reminder from the Gamemaster about that objective containing only information which you have previously learned.

Motivate may only affect a creature or object which you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Gesture: Ray.name: Gesture: Ray
Gesture: Ray.description:
You funnel the arcane power of a Rune into a point and project it outwards in a beam.

The Ray gesture scales using Wisdom and produces a line that is 1 foot wide and 30 feet long originating from the spellcaster, dealing 6 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. The gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 4 Action and 1 Focus.

Telecognition.name: Telecognition
Telecognition.description: A rudimentary example of the complex art of penetrating the minds of others, Telecognition skims thoughts from the surface of a subject's mind like leaves from the surface of a pond. Though it may not be disruptive, it is unsubtle— just as the pond ripples when its surface is touched, so too does the mind.

Telecognition.name: Telecognition
Telecognition.description:
You reach into the mind of a Humanoid or Giant creature, attempting to penetrate their Willpower defense to understand their thoughts and motives. The target of this spell is aware of the intrusion, even if they cannot perceive you.

If successful, the Gamemaster (in the case of an Adversary target) or Player (in the case of a Hero target) must describe to you in 3 words or less what idea or sentiment is at the forefront of their thoughts in the current moment.

Upon a Critical Success, this description may use up to 10 words to convey deeper understanding.

Mental Fortress.name: Mental Fortress
Mental Fortress.description: Your strong will makes you exceedingly difficult to influence. You gain +1 to your Willpower defense and +5 resistance to Psychic damage.

Thoughtbinder.name: Thoughtbinder
Thoughtbinder.description:
You are highly skilled in weaving the Rune of Control. Spells which use this Rune cause the @Condition[dominated] condition on Critical Hits.

The Dominated effect lasts for 1 Round and deals your Wisdom ability score as additional Psychic damage to Morale.

Gesture: Pulse.name: Gesture: Pulse
Gesture: Pulse.description:
Expel the arcane power of a Rune in a radius that travels outward with you at its center.

The Pulse gesture scales using Presence and produces an emanation with 10 foot radius, dealing 8 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. The gesture requires 2 Hands to cast and has a base cost of 5 Action and 2 Focus.

Playtest Notes

This talent is currently placed at a Tier 4 node. It will eventually only be attainable at a higher level (probably Level 6 required). It is currently available "early" for testing.

Control Proficiency.name: Control Proficiency
Control Proficiency.description:
You have fluency in weaving spellcraft using the Rune of Control. You gain a +1 Skill Bonus for spells cast using this Rune.

Playtest Notes

This talent will eventually also provide an upgrade to the Motivate action, expanding its effectiveness or including new options for how to use it.

Acid Spray.name: Acid Spray
Acid Spray.description: The creature has salivary glands which produce a caustic acidic spray.

Acid Spray.name: Acid Spray
Acid Spray.description:
The creature expels a spray of acidic bile in a 10 foot fan.

On a Critical Hit, this attack causes the @Condition[corroding] condition for 3 Turns.

Burrower.name: Burrower
Burrower.description:
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} has a supernatural ability to rapidly burrow through solid surfaces which are not entirely impermeable.

Additionally, it can compress its body to pass through apertures that can accommodate ¼ of its Size.

Explosive Emergence.name: Explosive Emergence
Explosive Emergence.description:
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} emerges from a subterranean position with surprising and sudden force. This action may only be activated immediately the creature leaves the @Condition[burrowing] state.

The @ref[actor.name]{creature} erupts to Strike against all enemies within its weapon range with an Empowered attack.

archetype.name: Burrower
archetype.description: Beasts or beast-like creatures which are expert at burrowing through solid material.

Breath.name: Breath
Breath.description:

On a Critical Hit, this attack causes the @Condition[corroding] condition for 3 Turns.

Slowing Breath.name: Slowing Breath
Slowing Breath.description: The Dragon exhales gas in a 10ft fan Slowing targets.

Slowing Breath.name: Slowing Breath
Slowing Breath.description: The Dragon exhales gas in a 10ft fan causing the Slowed Condition on a hit.

Corruption Absorption.name: Corruption Absorption
Corruption Absorption.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} has an exceptional ability to shrug off the effects of Death magic. Its Corruption resistance is doubled and if that resistance would reduce an amount of damage below zero, the negative amount is received as Healing instead.

Flight.name: Flight
Flight.description: This creature gains a fly speed equal to its stride.

Rotting Breath.name: Rotting Breath
Rotting Breath.description: The Dragon Breaths out a blast of necrotic gas rotting targets on contact.

Rotting Breath.name: Rotting Breath
Rotting Breath.description: The dragon breaths forth a blast of rotting gas dealing corruption damage to targets in a 10ft fan. On a crit the target gains the Decaying Condition for 3 turns.

Restless Dead.name: Restless Dead
Restless Dead.description:
The @ref[actor.name]{creature}'s life is sustained by necromantic magic or otherworldly forces. When it would be considered @Condition[dead] it is instead @Condition[incapacitated].

After the conclusion of combat, the @ref[actor.name]{creature} may begin to perform the Recover action, regaining consciousness after the recovery is complete. Recovery in this fashion may be prevented in one of the following ways:

  • The creature was incapacitated by a type of damage for which it is Vulnerable.

  • The magical forces which caused it to rise as undead are disrupted, countered, or otherwise dispelled.

  • The creature's body is destroyed to a degree that it can no longer maintain its physical form.

Amphibious.description: This creature can breath underwater in addition to air.

Steam Breath.name: Steam Breath
Steam Breath.description: The Creature breaths forth a blast of scalding hot air in a 20ft fan.

Steam Breath.name: Steam Breath
Steam Breath.description:
The Creature breaths forth a blast of scalding hot air in a 20ft fan.

On a Critical Hit, this attack causes the Burning condition for 3 turns.

Reinforcement.name: Reinforcement
Reinforcement.description: Increase Armor defense by 1 for each Tier of this suffix.

Magical Sight.name: Magical Sight
Magical Sight.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} has otherworldly sight that makes it especially aware of dangers or opportunities. It gains +2 Boons to any Awareness check and can see @Condition[invisible] creatures.

Elusive Flight.name: Elusive Flight
Elusive Flight.description: This @ref[actor.name]{creature} is especially elusive while in flight, able to swoop in and out of combat without provoking any Disengagement. It can be engaged if it lands upon the ground and Disengagement may apply if it attempts to return to flight.

Flight.name: Flight
Flight.description: This creature gains a fly speed equal to its stride.

Bonded Mind.name: Bonded Mind
Bonded Mind.description: The mind of a @ref[actor.name]{creature} with this talent is inextricably bound to other members of its group. It is capable of instantaneous telepathic communication with any other @ref[actor.taxonomy.name]{creature of its taxonomy} within 60 feet.

Gesture: Fan.name: Gesture: Fan
Gesture: Fan.description:
You shape the essence of a Rune into a sweeping or splintered arc to strike multiple targets in close proximity.

The Fan gesture scales using Intellect and targets a 120 degree arc with 6 foot radius. It deals 6 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 3 Action and 1 Focus.

Gesture: Influence.name: Gesture: Influence
Gesture: Influence.description:
You intensify the arcane power of a Rune into a concentrated direct contact which is generally a more powerful evolution of the basic Touch gesture.

The Influence gesture scales using Presence and targets a single adjacent creature. It deals 10 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 3 Action and 1 Focus.

Rune: Illusion.name: Rune: Illusion
Rune: Illusion.description:
The chaotic force of trickery and whimsy. The illusion rune governs magical manifestations of falsehood or misdirection.

The Illusion rune scales using Intellect, targets Willpower defense, and deals Psychic damage to Morale. It is opposed by the orderly rune of Illumination.

Seeming.name: Seeming
Seeming.description:
Your command of the Rune of Illusion allows you to fabricate perception in various simple ways and to manipulate shadow and light to create distraction or entertainment, producing one of the following effects:

  • Modify a single aspect of your own physical appearance. Such alterations might include adjusting the sound of your voice, changing the color of your eyes, gaining illusory horns, or appearing slightly taller or shorter. The alteration persists until you Rest or enact a different alteration and can be verified as illusory by physical inspection.

  • Manifest a convincing recreation of a short sound or single scent that you can clearly recall. The illusion originates from your position and lasts for 10 seconds. You can control the volume of the sound or odorousness of the scent to be perceptible up to a range of 60 feet or shorter.

  • Decouple your shadow from your form, specifically controlling its movements separately from your own. You can maintain this illusion as long as you do not perform any other action that consumes Focus.

Seeming may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Rune: Control.name: Rune: Control
Rune: Control.description:
The orderly force of discipline and permanence. The Control rune governs thought, reason, and persistence.

The Control rune scales using Wisdom, targets Willpower, and deals Psychic damage to Morale. It is opposed by the chaotic rune of Kinesis.

  • Understand the abstract motivations of another living creature which allows you to touch it. You are able to intuit their immediate goals expressed in the form of a single verb.

  • Intensely focus on your current objective and the means of achieving it. You receive a brief hint or reminder from the Gamemaster about that objective containing only information which you have previously learned.

Motivate may only affect a creature or object which you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Playtest Notes

Protective Mirage.name: Protective Mirage
Protective Mirage.description: You Aspect yourself in a mirage of shifting Illumination and Shadow which mask your current position and allow you to Elude incoming blows.

Protective Mirage.name: Protective Mirage
Protective Mirage.description: You become surrounded by three illusory duplicates which last up to 10 Rounds. Any incoming Strike against you is made with a number of Banes equal to two times your number of duplicates remaining. Each time a Strike misses you, one of your duplicates disappears.

Invisibility.name: Invisibility
Invisibility.description: A sophisticated use of Illusory magic, the Invisibility spell allows the caster to wrap light and shadow around themselves like donning a cloak, reflecting the world about them as if they were not standing there. What person wouldn't believe it when their own eyes tell them that there is nothing to see?

Invisibility.name: Invisibility
Invisibility.description: You become @Condition[invisible] and cannot be detected using sight-based perception. You cannot be directly targeted by any action. This spell must be Maintained in order to remain in effect.

Shadow Gait.name: Shadow Gait
Shadow Gait.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} is able to step into and out of shadow itself to move in nightmarish and unpredictable ways.

Shadow Gait.name: Shadow Gait
Shadow Gait.description: While in dim light or darkness, the @ref[actor.name] can meld into shadow to disappear from view. It may Move and reappear within a different area which is also dim light or darkness. This is a Displace movement which provokes no disengagement.

Shadow Breath.description: The Dragon Breaths out a blast of necrotic gas rotting targets on contact. If a creature is killed by this attack it rises as a @UUID[Compendium.builders-crucible-creature-pack.creatures.Actor.cMB6VWYRpQRjjPym] in an hour.

Unshakeable Stance.description: You cannot be unvoluntarily Moved or knocked Prone by any action that is not a Critical Success rolled by an enemy or a Critical Failure rolled by yourself.

Pouncing Strike.name: Pouncing Strike
Pouncing Strike.description: This creature lunges forward, putting its whole weight behind a leaping strike.

Pouncing Strike.name: Pouncing Strike
Pouncing Strike.description:
This attack may be used after a Move that brings the @ref[actor.name]{creature} at least 10 feet closer to its target. If the creature was above the target, this attack gains +1 Boon per 10 feet of elevation decrease in that movement.

If this attack is a Critical Hit, the target of the attack is immediately knocked @Condition[prone].

Natural Weapon Training.name: Natural Weapon Training
Natural Weapon Training.description: You have a developed familiarity with using features of your own body as a natural weapons including claws, jaws, tails, or other mechanisms of self-defense. You are Trained with weapons in the Natural category.

Wild Strike.name: Wild Strike
Wild Strike.description: Immediately after you perform a basic Strike, you perform a reduced-cost follow-up Strike against the same target using a different Natural weapon that you have access to.

Restless Dead.name: Restless Dead
Restless Dead.description:
The @ref[actor.name]{creature}'s life is sustained by necromantic magic or otherworldly forces. When it would be considered @Condition[dead] it is instead @Condition[incapacitated].

After the conclusion of combat, the @ref[actor.name]{creature} may begin to perform the Recover action, regaining consciousness after the recovery is complete. Recovery in this fashion may be prevented in one of the following ways:

  • The creature was incapacitated by a type of damage for which it is Vulnerable.

  • The magical forces which caused it to rise as undead are disrupted, countered, or otherwise dispelled.

  • The creature's body is destroyed to a degree that it can no longer maintain its physical form.

Shadow Gait.name: Shadow Gait
Shadow Gait.description: While in dim light or darkness, the @ref[actor.name] can meld into shadow to disappear from view. It may Move and reappear within a different area which is also dim light or darkness. This is a Displace movement which provokes no disengagement.

Shadow Breath.name: Shadow Breath
Shadow Breath.description: The Dragon Breaths out a blast of necrotic gas rotting targets on contact. If a creature is killed by this attack it rises as a @UUID[Compendium.builders-crucible-creature-pack.creatures.Actor.cMB6VWYRpQRjjPym] in an hour.

Shadow Breath.name: Shadow Breath
Shadow Breath.description: The dragon breaths forth a blast of rotting gas dealing corruption damage to targets in a 10ft fan. A creature killed by this gas rises as a @UUID[Compendium.builders-crucible-creature-pack.creatures.Actor.cMB6VWYRpQRjjPym] in 1 hour.

Raking Talons.name: Raking Talons
Raking Talons.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} attacks rapidly with its talons, dealing multiple raking blows against a single target.

Raking Talons.name: Raking Talons
Raking Talons.description:
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} attacks swiftly with both talons.

If at least one attack results in a Critical Success, it inflicts the @Condition[bleeding] condition for 2 Rounds.

Tail Sweep.name: Tail Sweep
Tail Sweep.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} can whip its heavy tail across the battlefield with terrible force.

Tail Sweep.name: Tail Sweep
Tail Sweep.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} sweeps its heavy tail in a circular arc, striking all creatures within range. On a Critical Hit, affected targets become @Condition[staggered] for until the end of their next turn.

Horrific Critical.name: Horrific Critical
Horrific Critical.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} delivers savage and grotesque blows that evoke fear within any who behold them.

Horrific Critical.name: Horrific Critical
Horrific Critical.condition: Immediately after the creature achieves a Critical Hit with a melee attack.
Horrific Critical.description:
When the @ref[actor.name]{creature} achieves a Critical Hit using a melee attack it may exaggerate the blow in a way that evokes fear within those who behold the strike.

All the enemies within 30 feet who can see the creature face a Harmless attack against their Willpower or become @Condition[frightened] for 3 Turns.

Thick Skin.name: Thick Skin
Thick Skin.description: Your physical toughness makes you more resistant to harm. You gain +2 Resistance to Bludgeoning, Slashing, and Piercing damage.

Flight.name: Flight
Flight.description: This creature gains a fly speed equal to its stride.

Ice Walk.name: Ice Walk
Ice Walk.description: Cryovain can move across and climb icy surfaces as if they were normal terrain

Frost Breath.name: Frost Breath
Frost Breath.description: The dragon breaths forth a breath of ice cold air freezing anything on contact.

Frost Breath.name: Frost Breath
Frost Breath.description:
The Dragon Breaths forth a breath of ice cold air in a 20ft cone.

On a Critical Hit, this attack causes the Freezing condition for 3 turns.

Shapeshift.name: Shapeshift
Shapeshift.description: The Creature Shapeshifts into the shape of a humanoid or beast that is equal or lower than it in level.

Shapeshift.name: Shapeshift
Shapeshift.description: The Creature Shapeshifts into a humanoid or beast of its level or lower.

Paralyzing Breath.name: Paralyzing Breath
Paralyzing Breath.description: The Dragon lets out a breath of gas paralyzing targets.

Paralyzing Breath.name: Paralyzing Breath
Paralyzing Breath.description: The Dragon lets forth a breath of gas in a 10ft fan, that causes the Paralyzed condition on a hit.

Horrific Critical.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} delivers savage and grotesque blows that evoke fear within any who behold them.

All the enemies within 30 feet who can see the creature face a Harmless attack against their Willpower or become @Condition[frightened] for 3 Turns.

Thick Skin.description: Your physical toughness makes you more resistant to harm. You gain +2 Resistance to Bludgeoning, Slashing, and Piercing damage.

Animate Boulders.name: Animate Boulders
Animate Boulders.description: The Creature animates two boulders it can see within 30ft of it. These boulders become @UUID[Compendium.builders-crucible-creature-pack.creatures.Actor.FjB79NRT5qOLHMpq] and remain animated until 1 minute has passed or they have died.

Immutable Form.name: Immutable Form
Immutable Form.description: The @ref[actor.name] is immune to any spell or effect which alters its physical form.

False Appearance.name: False Appearance
False Appearance.description: While it remains motionless, the @ref[actor.name]{creature} is indistinguishable from some other object or material.

Armor Crusher.name: Armor Crusher
Armor Crusher.description: You have mastered the art of striking armored opponents with such force that the armor itself becomes a weapon against them.

Armor Crusher.name: Armor Crusher
Armor Crusher.description: You make an unarmed Strike against a nearby enemy. If the attack results in a Glancing Blow, you spend 1 Focus if possible to deal bonus damage equal to your Toughness score.

description.public: The pinnacle of personal protection, plate mail encases the body in carefully fitted steel plates, offering near-complete protection while allowing impressive mobility for a trained wearer.

Thick Skin.name: Thick Skin
Thick Skin.description: Your physical toughness makes you more resistant to harm. You gain +2 Resistance to Bludgeoning, Slashing, and Piercing damage.

Unshakeable Stance.name: Unshakeable Stance
Unshakeable Stance.description: You cannot be unvoluntarily Moved or knocked Prone by any action that is not a Critical Success rolled by an enemy or a Critical Failure rolled by yourself.

Tail Sweep.name: Tail Sweep
Tail Sweep.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} can whip its heavy tail across the battlefield with terrible force.

Tail Sweep.name: Tail Sweep
Tail Sweep.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} sweeps its heavy tail in a circular arc, striking all creatures within range. On a Critical Hit, affected targets become @Condition[staggered] for until the end of their next turn.

Aqueous Transmission.name: Aqueous Transmission
Aqueous Transmission.description: When the @ref[actor.name]{creature} is within water, it can instantaneously transport itself to any unoccupied space within the same body of water up to 120 feet away. It does not need to be able to see the destination to make this Move.

Armor Crusher.name: Armor Crusher
Armor Crusher.description: You make an unarmed Strike against a nearby enemy. If the attack results in a Glancing Blow, you spend 1 Focus if possible to deal bonus damage equal to your Toughness score.

Assess Strength.name: Assess Strength
Assess Strength.description: You observe a creature you can see to assess it's notable areas of strength.

Amorphous.name: Amorphous
Amorphous.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} may move through a space as narrow as 1 inch in diameter without any penalty to its Stride. It gains a bonus to Dodge equal to half its Toughness score and is immune to the @Condition[restrained] condition.

Restless Dead.name: Restless Dead
Restless Dead.description:
The @ref[actor.name]{creature}'s life is sustained by necromantic magic or otherworldly forces. When it would be considered @Condition[dead] it is instead @Condition[incapacitated].

After the conclusion of combat, the @ref[actor.name]{creature} may begin to perform the Recover action, regaining consciousness after the recovery is complete. Recovery in this fashion may be prevented in one of the following ways:

  • The creature was incapacitated by a type of damage for which it is Vulnerable.

  • The magical forces which caused it to rise as undead are disrupted, countered, or otherwise dispelled.

  • The creature's body is destroyed to a degree that it can no longer maintain its physical form.

Corruption Absorption.name: Corruption Absorption
Corruption Absorption.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} has an exceptional ability to shrug off the effects of Death magic. Its Corruption resistance is doubled and if that resistance would reduce an amount of damage below zero, the negative amount is received as Healing instead.

Life Sense.name: Life Sense
Life Sense.description: A creature with this sense can detect any non undead creatures within 100ft of it even if they are behind full cover.

Potency.name: Potency
Potency.description: Adds an Enchantment Bonus to all Strikes which use this weapon based on the Tier of the affix.

Horrifying Visage.name: Horrifying Visage
Horrifying Visage.description: The Creature wails targeting each creature in a 30ft cone. A creature hit by this is Confused for 1 minute.

Horrifying Visage.name: Horrifying Visage
Horrifying Visage.description: The Creature wails targeting each creature in a 30ft cone. A creature hit by this is Confused for 1 minute in addition to any damage dealt.

Petrifying Gaze.name: Petrifying Gaze
Petrifying Gaze.description: The Creature can Petrify creatures that it meets eyes with.

Petrifying Gaze.name: Petrifying Gaze
Petrifying Gaze.description: The Creature locks eyes with one creature that can see it making a harmless attack that scales with toughness targeting willpower defense, if the attack is successful the target is petrified. While petrified the creature is incapacitated and invulnerable. The petrification ends if thus Creature dies.

Lightning Breath.name: Lightning Breath
Lightning Breath.description: The creature Emits a Blast of lightning in a 30ft line.

Breath.name: Breath
Breath.description:
The creature breaths a bolt of lightning in a 30 foot line.

On a Critical Hit, this attack causes the @Condition[Shocked] condition for 3 Turns.

Clinging Grip.name: Clinging Grip
Clinging Grip.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} is able to cling to vertical or overhead surfaces with exceptional grip or adhesion. This creature can avoid falling as long as they are adjacent to any solid surface which can reasonably support them.

Dropping Strike.name: Dropping Strike
Dropping Strike.description:
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} can drop from overhead to Strike a creature below it. The target creature suffers an Empowered attack which, if successful, knocks them @Condition[prone] in addition to dealing damage.

The @ref[actor.name]{creature} can suffer falling damage from this attack only if it misses its target.

Thermal Vision.name: Thermal Vision
Thermal Vision.description:
The @ref[actor.name]{Creature} perceives the world through differences in temperature with precision, allowing it to locate creatures whose bodily temperature deviates from ambient norms.

This allows detection of creatures whose body temperatures are Gelid, Cool, Warm, or Boiling up to 60 feet away as long as they are not behind total cover and as long as the @ref[actor.name]{creature} is not @Condition[blinded] or @Condition[incapacitated]. A creature detected in this way is treated as visible for the purposes of Actions which require sight.

Constrict.name: Constrict
Constrict.description: The Creature attempts to Squeeze the life out of its target.

Constrict.name: Constrict
Constrict.description: The creature attempts to squeeze the life out of its target. It makes a weakened athletics attack against its target; on a hit the target becomes Restrained and begins to Suffocate while restrained this way. This Hold can be broken by a athletics attack against the fortitude of the creature by the target or another creature within engagement range.

Berserker Rage.name: Berserker Rage
Berserker Rage.condition: You have suffered damage to your Health pool since your last turn in Combat.
Berserker Rage.description: You become Enraged. While Enraged you deal 4 additional damage on all melee attacks. You may attempt to end the effect on your own turn by succeeding on a Willpower test against a DC of 20. The effect ends automatically when Combat is concluded.

Flight.name: Flight
Flight.description: This creature gains a fly speed equal to its stride.

Swooping Strike.name: Swooping Strike
Swooping Strike.description: This @ref[actor.name]{creature} swoops from high above into a diving attack.

Swooping Strike.name: Swooping Strike
Swooping Strike.description:
This attack may be used after a Move which descended at least 10 feet towards the target. The attack gains +1 Boon per 10 feet of elevation decrease in that movement.

If this attack is a Critical Hit, the target of the attack is immediately knocked @Condition[prone].

Precision Shot.name: Precision Shot
Precision Shot.description: You take time to steady your aim and target the weakest point of a foe. You may only get one shot, but you make it count.

Precision Shot.name: Precision Shot
Precision Shot.description: You steady your aim and fire a single accurate shot.

Evasive Shot.name: Evasive Shot
Evasive Shot.description: You are an expert at firing shots with ranged weaponry while evading enemy attacks. After performing a ranged weapon attack, you gain half your Stride in additional free movement.

Projectile Weapon Training.name: Projectile Weapon Training
Projectile Weapon Training.description: You have a basic education in archery and other projectile weaponry. You are no longer treated as Untrained with weapons in the Projectile categories.

Quick Draw.name: Quick Draw
Quick Draw.description: You can loose a shot under pressure, although with decreased accuracy. You perform a Strike that is Difficult, but has a reduced Action cost.

description.public: A tall, self-bow often taller than the archer who draws it, the longbow requires great strength and years of practice to master, sending arrows with deadly force across the battlefield.

archetype.name: Archer
archetype.description: Ranged combatants with training is the use of bows.

Flight.name: Flight
Flight.description: This creature gains a fly speed equal to its stride.

Acid Breath.name: Acid Breath
Acid Breath.description: The creature has salivary glands which produce a caustic acidic spray.

Breath.name: Breath
Breath.description:
The creature expels a spray of acidic bile in a 30 foot line.

On a Critical Hit, this attack causes the @Condition[corroding] condition for 3 Turns.

Blinding Spit.name: Blinding Spit
Blinding Spit.description: The Creature spits a caustic glob at a target within 30 feet making an attack against the targets reflex defense. On a hit the creature is blinded for 1 turn.

Flight.name: Flight
Flight.description: This creature gains a fly speed equal to its stride.

Lightning Breath.name: Lightning Breath
Lightning Breath.description: The creature Emits a Blast of lightning in a 30ft line.

Breath.name: Breath
Breath.description:
The creature breaths a bolt of lightning in a 30 foot line.

On a Critical Hit, this attack causes the @Condition[Shocked] condition for 3 Turns.

Rune: Earth.name: Rune: Earth
Rune: Earth.description:
The orderly force of elemental earth, responsible for physical matter. The Earth rune governs minerals, metals, soils, and other physical compounds.

The Earth rune scales using Wisdom, targets Reflex, and deals Acid damage to Health. It is opposed by the chaotic rune of Lightning.

Mould.name: Mould
Mould.description:
Your command of the Rune of Earth allows you to manipulate raw forces of rock, mineral, and soil in basic ways, producing one of the following effects:

  • Quickly shape up to one cubic foot of available material into a simple geometric form like a cuboid, ellipsoid, or polyhedron.

  • Precisely copy the physical shape of a held object that is smaller than a 6-inch cube, reproducing it from available clay, stone, or metal. The replica retains no useful properties except for its physical form.

  • Separate and collect earthen particles from the surface of an object, creature, or liquid that you touch, rendering the subject completely cleaned or purified in moments.

Mould may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Acid Absorption.name: Acid Absorption
Acid Absorption.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} has an exceptional ability to thrive within acidic environments. Its Acid resistance is doubled and if that resistance would reduce an amount of damage below zero, the negative amount is received as Healing instead.

False Appearance.name: False Appearance
False Appearance.description: While it remains motionless, the @ref[actor.name]{creature} is indistinguishable from some other object or material.

Rolling Bash.name: Rolling Bash
Rolling Bash.description: The Creature rolls forward up to 15ft making a empowered strike against the first creature they encounter. On a critical success the target is also knocked Prone.

Rolling Bash.name: Rolling Bash
Rolling Bash.description: The Creature charges forward up to 15ft making a empowered strike against the first creature they encounter. On a critical success the target is also knocked Prone.

Animate Boulders.name: Animate Boulders
Animate Boulders.description: The Creature Animates two boulders within 30ft of it.

Animate Boulders.name: Animate Boulders
Animate Boulders.description: The Creature animates two boulders it can see within 30ft of it. These boulders become @UUID[Compendium.builders-crucible-creature-pack.creatures.Actor.FjB79NRT5qOLHMpq] and remain animated until 1 minute has passed or they have died.

taxonomy.name: Earth Elemental
taxonomy.description: Elemental creatures corresponding to the element of Earth.

Flight.name: Flight
Flight.description: This creature gains a fly speed equal to its stride.

Flame Breath.name: Flame Breath
Flame Breath.description: The Dragon Breaths forth a blast of fire in a 20ft cone

Flame Breath.name: Flame Breath
Flame Breath.description:
The dragon Breaths forth a blast of fire in a 20ft cone.

On a Critical Hit, this attack causes the Burning condition for 3 turns.

Shapeshift.name: Shapeshift
Shapeshift.description: The Creature Shapeshifts into the shape of a humanoid or beast that is equal or lower than it in level.

Shapeshift.name: Shapeshift
Shapeshift.description: The Creature Shapeshifts into a humanoid or beast of its level or lower.

Sleep Breath.name: Sleep Breath
Sleep Breath.description: The dragon Exhales a cloud of gas in a 10ft fan. This cloud attacks targets Fortitude and causes the target to gain the Asleep Condition for 3 turns.

Sleep Breath.name: Sleep Breath
Sleep Breath.description: The Dragon lets out a breath of gas that inflicts the Asleep Condition on targets in a 10ft fan

Flight.name: Flight
Flight.description: This creature gains a fly speed equal to its stride.

Lightning Breath.name: Lightning Breath
Lightning Breath.description: The creature Emits a Blast of lightning in a 30ft line.

Breath.name: Breath
Breath.description:
The creature breaths a bolt of lightning in a 30 foot line.

On a Critical Hit, this attack causes the @Condition[Shocked] condition for 3 Turns.

Shapeshift.name: Shapeshift
Shapeshift.description: The Creature Shapeshifts into the shape of a humanoid or beast that is equal or lower than it in level.

Shapeshift.name: Shapeshift
Shapeshift.description: The Creature Shapeshifts into a humanoid or beast of its level or lower.

Repulsion Breath.name: Repulsion Breath
Repulsion Breath.description: The Dragon lets out a burst of repulsive energy blasting back targets in a cone.

Repulsion Breath.name: Repulsion Breath
Repulsion Breath.description: The dragon lets out a blast of repulsive breath in a 20ft cone blasting anyone hit back 10ft.

Stealth Novice.name: Stealth Novice
Stealth Novice.description:
You have received training in the basics of stealth, infiltration, and subterfuge. You gain the Novice rank in the Stealth skill and are no longer considered Untrained in that skill.

You know how to use light and shadow to mask your presence, to distribute your weight when walking in order to move more quietly, and you have learned a few tricks of disguise in order to blend into a crowd. You can appear unsuspicious when surrounded by others, hide in a darkened room, and can move silently enough to avoid detection by the average person.

Heavy Weapon Training.name: Heavy Weapon Training
Heavy Weapon Training.description: You know how to use a heavy weapon to deliver punishing blows, putting your entire strength behind every swing. You are Trained with all weapons in the Heavy and Balanced categories.

Heavy Strike.name: Heavy Strike
Heavy Strike.description: You unleash a powerful Strike with your mainhand weapon. The attack is slower to execute, but is Empowered to deliver additional damage.

Sundering Strike.name: Sundering Strike
Sundering Strike.description: You know a martial technique to exploit the weakest points of an enemy's defenses, exposing them to further harm.

Sundering Strike.name: Sundering Strike
Sundering Strike.description: You make a Strike with your mainhand weapon which, if successful, applies the Exposed condition to your target for 3 rounds. This attack is Difficult to perform and deals reduced damage.

description.public: Built to crush plate and shatter shields, the war hammer features a heavy, blunt head mounted atop a reinforced haft, delivering ruin in the hands of those who favor power over finesse.
A small, round metal shield roughly the size of a dinner plate, the buckler is a duelist’s tool for deflecting blades and controlling space, worn on the forearm or gripped like a weapon.
Toughened skins from large beasts or monsters, these rugged armors are worn by hunters and wildfolk, offering durable—but crude—defense in the field.

Stealth Novice.name: Stealth Novice
Stealth Novice.description:
You have received training in the basics of stealth, infiltration, and subterfuge. You gain the Novice rank in the Stealth skill and are no longer considered Untrained in that skill.

You know how to use light and shadow to mask your presence, to distribute your weight when walking in order to move more quietly, and you have learned a few tricks of disguise in order to blend into a crowd. You can appear unsuspicious when surrounded by others, hide in a darkened room, and can move silently enough to avoid detection by the average person.
