Heavy Weapon Training.description: You know how to use a heavy weapon to deliver punishing blows, putting your entire strength behind every swing. You are Trained with all weapons in the Heavy and Balanced categories.

Heavy Strike.name: Heavy Strike
Heavy Strike.description: You unleash a powerful Strike with your mainhand weapon. The attack is slower to execute, but is Empowered to deliver additional damage.

Sundering Strike.name: Sundering Strike
Sundering Strike.description: You know a martial technique to exploit the weakest points of an enemy's defenses, exposing them to further harm.

Sundering Strike.name: Sundering Strike
Sundering Strike.description: You make a Strike with your mainhand weapon which, if successful, applies the Exposed condition to your target for 3 rounds. This attack is Difficult to perform and deals reduced damage.

description.public: Built to crush plate and shatter shields, the war hammer features a heavy, blunt head mounted atop a reinforced haft, delivering ruin in the hands of those who favor power over finesse.
A small, round metal shield roughly the size of a dinner plate, the buckler is a duelist’s tool for deflecting blades and controlling space, worn on the forearm or gripped like a weapon.
Toughened skins from large beasts or monsters, these rugged armors are worn by hunters and wildfolk, offering durable—but crude—defense in the field.

Heavy Weapon Proficiency.name: Heavy Weapon Proficiency
Heavy Weapon Proficiency.description: You have a fluent education in the use of martial weaponry. You gain the Journeyman training rank and a +1 Skill Bonus with weapons in the Simple, Heavy, and Balanced categories.

Concussive Blows.name: Concussive Blows
Concussive Blows.description:
Your physical power wielding melee weapons which deal Bludgeoning damage can cause the Staggered condition on Critical Hits which deal damage to Health.

The Staggered effect lasts for 1 round and reduces your target's maximum Action by 1.

Bull Rush.name: Bull Rush
Bull Rush.description: Make an Athletics skill Attack against an adjacent enemy contested by your target's Fortitude defense. On a success you may move up to your Stride directly through the enemy's space. Your enemy is knocked Prone and may not make any attack of opportunity against you. On a failure your movement is blocked and your remain in your current position.

Explosive Emergence.name: Explosive Emergence
Explosive Emergence.description:
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} emerges from a subterranean position with surprising and sudden force. This action may only be activated immediately the creature leaves the @Condition[burrowing] state.

The @ref[actor.name]{creature} erupts to Strike against all enemies within its weapon range with an Empowered attack.

Thermal Vision.name: Thermal Vision
Thermal Vision.description:
The @ref[actor.name]{Creature} perceives the world through differences in temperature with precision, allowing it to locate creatures whose bodily temperature deviates from ambient norms.

This allows detection of creatures whose body temperatures are Gelid, Cool, Warm, or Boiling up to 60 feet away as long as they are not behind total cover and as long as the @ref[actor.name]{creature} is not @Condition[blinded] or @Condition[incapacitated]. A creature detected in this way is treated as visible for the purposes of Actions which require sight.

False Appearance.name: False Appearance
False Appearance.description: While it remains motionless, the @ref[actor.name]{creature} is indistinguishable from some other object or material.

Smother.name: Smother
Smother.description: The Creature attempts to grapple and choke its target.

Smother.name: Smother
Smother.description: The creature makes unarmed melee attack against a creature in its reach, if it hits the target is grappled, while grappled this way the creature is suffocating.

Light Sensitivity.name: Light Sensitivity
Light Sensitivity.description:
While in Bright light, the @ref[actor.name]{creature} suffers 2 Banes to all actions.

This mechanic is handled through an Active Effect that is easily toggled when applicable.

Sunlight Weakness.name: Sunlight Weakness
Sunlight Weakness.description: The creature suffers banes to all actions when exposed to sunlight.

Wailing Moan.name: Wailing Moan
Wailing Moan.description: The Creature wails targeting each creature in a 30ft pulse. A creature hit by this is Confused for 1 minute.

Wailing Moan.name: Wailing Moan
Wailing Moan.description: The Creature wails targeting each creature in a 30ft pulse. A creature hit by this is Confused for 1 minute in addition to any damage dealt.

Protective Mirage.name: Protective Mirage
Protective Mirage.description: You Aspect yourself in a mirage of shifting Illumination and Shadow which mask your current position and allow you to Elude incoming blows.

Protective Mirage.name: Protective Mirage
Protective Mirage.description: You become surrounded by three illusory duplicates which last up to 10 Rounds. Any incoming Strike against you is made with a number of Banes equal to two times your number of duplicates remaining. Each time a Strike misses you, one of your duplicates disappears.

False Appearance.name: False Appearance
False Appearance.description: While it remains motionless, the @ref[actor.name]{creature} is indistinguishable from some other object or material.

Echolocation.name: Echolocation
Echolocation.description:
@ref[actor.name]{This creature} perceives the world through the emission of sonic pulses that detect shapes with precision, allowing it to locate creatures that are moving or otherwise emitting sound, up to 60 feet away as long as they are not behind total cover. If the creature is @Condition[deafened], this sense may not be used.

A creature detected using @ref[name] is treated as visible for the purposes of actions which require you to see your target.

Smother.name: Smother
Smother.description: The Creature attempts to grapple and choke its target.

Smother.name: Smother
Smother.description: The creature makes unarmed melee attack against a creature in its reach, if it hits the target is grappled, while grappled this way the creature is suffocating.

Engulfing Darkness.name: Engulfing Darkness
Engulfing Darkness.description: You conjure an oppressive sphere of magical darkness that shrouds vision and suffocates light within its area.

Engulfing Darkness.name: Engulfing Darkness
Engulfing Darkness.description:
You create a sphere of magical darkness around your current position with 20 foot radius which remains in place for 6 rounds or until dispelled.

Within the area of this darkness all non-magical light sources are quenched and creatures are treated as @Condition[blinded].

The area of this sphere is constrained by solid walls. Creatures outside this area cannot see into it and the effective area of light sources outside this area ends at its perimeter.

WIP: This spell does not yet automatically create a darkness source, which must be done manually for now. Eventually this will be automated using a new Foundry VTT version 14 framework for template placement.

Flight.name: Flight
Flight.description: This creature gains a fly speed equal to its stride.

Clinging Grip.name: Clinging Grip
Clinging Grip.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} is able to cling to vertical or overhead surfaces with exceptional grip or adhesion. This creature can avoid falling as long as they are adjacent to any solid surface which can reasonably support them.

Dropping Strike.name: Dropping Strike
Dropping Strike.description:
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} can drop from overhead to Strike a creature below it. The target creature suffers an Empowered attack which, if successful, knocks them @Condition[prone] in addition to dealing damage.

The @ref[actor.name]{creature} can suffer falling damage from this attack only if it misses its target.

Bestial Senses.name: Bestial Senses
Bestial Senses.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} has finely honed senses and is particularly perceptive of their environment, all Awareness checks gain +2 Boons.

Natural Weapon Training.name: Natural Weapon Training
Natural Weapon Training.description: You have a developed familiarity with using features of your own body as a natural weapons including claws, jaws, tails, or other mechanisms of self-defense. You are Trained with weapons in the Natural category.

Wild Strike.name: Wild Strike
Wild Strike.description: Immediately after you perform a basic Strike, you perform a reduced-cost follow-up Strike against the same target using a different Natural weapon that you have access to.

Thermal Vision.name: Thermal Vision
Thermal Vision.description:
The @ref[actor.name]{Creature} perceives the world through differences in temperature with precision, allowing it to locate creatures whose bodily temperature deviates from ambient norms.

This allows detection of creatures whose body temperatures are Gelid, Cool, Warm, or Boiling up to 60 feet away as long as they are not behind total cover and as long as the @ref[actor.name]{creature} is not @Condition[blinded] or @Condition[incapacitated]. A creature detected in this way is treated as visible for the purposes of Actions which require sight.

Paralyzing Tentacles.name: Paralyzing Tentacles
Paralyzing Tentacles.description: The Creatures tentacles are coated in a paralyzing toxin that helps them capture prey.

Paralyzing Tentacles.name: Paralyzing Tentacles
Paralyzing Tentacles.description: The Creature attempts to grab its target with its tentacles and subject it to its paralyzing toxins. If the attack is successful and the target is equal or lesser in Size, The target is also paralyzed for 1 turn.

Bull Rush.name: Bull Rush
Bull Rush.description: You can use your physical prowess to push past opponents who block your path.

Bull Rush.name: Bull Rush
Bull Rush.description: Make an Athletics skill Attack against an adjacent enemy contested by your target's Fortitude defense. On a success you may move up to your Stride directly through the enemy's space. Your enemy is knocked Prone and may not make any attack of opportunity against you. On a failure your movement is blocked and your remain in your current position.

Preparedness.name: Preparedness
Preparedness.description: You seem to always be prepared for the moment at hand. You may sacrifice your free movement for the Round to instead equip an Item from your inventory without spending any Action points.

Assess Strength.name: Assess Strength
Assess Strength.description:
You take a moment to observe a creature which you can see and develop intuition about its areas of strength.

Perform a Knowledge Test using a Skill chosen by the Gamemaster. On a success, you learn which Defense type of Physical, Fortutude, Willpower, or Reflex is highest for the creature. On a Critical Success you learn the two highest defense types.

Assess Strength.name: Assess Strength
Assess Strength.description: You observe a creature you can see to assess it's notable areas of strength.

Precision Shot.name: Precision Shot
Precision Shot.description: You take time to steady your aim and target the weakest point of a foe. You may only get one shot, but you make it count.

Precision Shot.name: Precision Shot
Precision Shot.description: You steady your aim and fire a single accurate shot.

Projectile Weapon Training.name: Projectile Weapon Training
Projectile Weapon Training.description: You have a basic education in archery and other projectile weaponry. You are no longer treated as Untrained with weapons in the Projectile categories.

Quick Draw.name: Quick Draw
Quick Draw.description: You can loose a shot under pressure, although with decreased accuracy. You perform a Strike that is Difficult, but has a reduced Action cost.

Light Weapon Training.name: Light Weapon Training
Light Weapon Training.description: You know how to wield light weapons fluidly with a high degree of maneuverability and grace in combat. You are Trained with all weapons in the Light and Balanced categories.

Lunge.name: Lunge
Lunge.description:
You dart forward nimbly, making a strike with sudden and unexpected swiftness to perform a Strike with a weapon which scales using Dexterity against a single target, with an increased range of +2 feet.

The attack is Difficult, but you do not move from your current position nor does this attack provoke Disengagement.

description.public: A tall, self-bow often taller than the archer who draws it, the longbow requires great strength and years of practice to master, sending arrows with deadly force across the battlefield.
A weapon of reach and rhythm, the spear features a long shaft tipped with steel, perfect for holding the line or launching with deadly force from behind a shield wall.

archetype.name: Scout
archetype.description: Individuals trained in reconnaissance and advance exploration of unknown areas.

Shapeshift.name: Shapeshift
Shapeshift.description: The Creature Shapeshifts into the shape of a humanoid or beast that is equal or lower than it in level.

Shapeshift.name: Shapeshift
Shapeshift.description: The Creature Shapeshifts into a humanoid or beast of its level or lower.

Operator.name: Operator
Operator.description:
You have ice in your veins and remain cool under pressure. Your physical toughness and mental acuity allow you to hone the danger of your situation to achieve the greatest results when the stakes are highest.

While in combat and not Incapacitated, you gain +1 Boon to all checks when you have less than 50% of your maximum Health remaining. You gain +2 Boons to all checks when you have less than 25% of your maximum Health remaining.

Strategic Repositioning.name: Strategic Repositioning
Strategic Repositioning.description:
You are always thinking ahead about where to position yourself should danger loom. Before Turn 1 of a Combat encounter, provided that you are not Unaware, you may immediately move 4 feet in any permitted direction.

If multiple combatants have this feature, repositioning occurs in reverse order of Initiative.

Subtle Extrication.name: Subtle Extrication
Subtle Extrication.description: You understand how to move away from an opponent without exposing yourself to the worst attacks in return. Any Disengagement Attack against you is performed without the 2 Boons that would ordinarily apply to such an attack.

Weak Points.name: Weak Points
Weak Points.description: You identify moments of opportunity to strike at an enemy's weak points. When attacking a target that is @Condition[unaware], @Condition[flanked], or @Condition[exposed] using a weapon which scales with Dexterity, you gain +2 damage to any Strike.

Light Weapon Training.name: Light Weapon Training
Light Weapon Training.description: You know how to wield light weapons fluidly with a high degree of maneuverability and grace in combat. You are Trained with all weapons in the Light and Balanced categories.

Lunge.name: Lunge
Lunge.description:
You dart forward nimbly, making a strike with sudden and unexpected swiftness to perform a Strike with a weapon which scales using Dexterity against a single target, with an increased range of +2 feet.

The attack is Difficult, but you do not move from your current position nor does this attack provoke Disengagement.

archetype.name: Operator
archetype.description: Operators are experts at maneuvering in tense situations, able to balance shrewd political sense with cunning and decisive action.

Natural Weapon Training.name: Natural Weapon Training
Natural Weapon Training.description: You have a developed familiarity with using features of your own body as a natural weapons including claws, jaws, tails, or other mechanisms of self-defense. You are Trained with weapons in the Natural category.

Wild Strike.name: Wild Strike
Wild Strike.description: Immediately after you perform a basic Strike, you perform a reduced-cost follow-up Strike against the same target using a different Natural weapon that you have access to.

Flame Breath.name: Flame Breath
Flame Breath.description: The Dragon Breaths forth a blast of fire in a 20ft cone

Flame Breath.name: Flame Breath
Flame Breath.description:
The dragon Breaths forth a blast of fire in a 20ft cone.

On a Critical Hit, this attack causes the Burning condition for 3 turns.

Natural Weapon Proficiency.name: Natural Weapon Proficiency
Natural Weapon Proficiency.description: You have a fluent familiarity with the use of natural bodily weapons. You gain the Journeyman training rank and a +1 Skill Bonus with weapons in the Natural category.

Cleave.name: Cleave
Cleave.description: A ferocious two-handed swing cleaves through foes in a 120 degree arc.

Dropping Strike.name: Dropping Strike
Dropping Strike.description:
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} can drop from overhead to Strike a creature below it. The target creature suffers an Empowered attack which, if successful, knocks them @Condition[prone] in addition to dealing damage.

The @ref[actor.name]{creature} can suffer falling damage from this attack only if it misses its target.

Cloud of Dust.name: Cloud of Dust
Cloud of Dust.description: The Creature Spins up a cloud of dust in a 15ft pulse making a harmless attack that scales with dexterity against the fortitude defense of targets. On a hit targets are blinded for 1 turn.

Petrifying Bite.name: Petrifying Bite
Petrifying Bite.description: The Cockatrice Bites a target, On a critical hit the target becomes petrified for 24 hours gaining the Incapacitated and Invulnerable conditions. The petrification also ends if the Cockatrice dies.

Rune: Control.name: Rune: Control
Rune: Control.description:
The orderly force of discipline and permanence. The Control rune governs thought, reason, and persistence.

The Control rune scales using Wisdom, targets Willpower, and deals Psychic damage to Morale. It is opposed by the chaotic rune of Kinesis.

Motivate.name: Motivate
Motivate.description:
Your command of the Rune of Control allows you to affect the decision making of others in basic ways, producing one of the following effects:

  • Moderately intensify or dampen the primary emotion being felt by a creature you touch. If the creature is intelligent enough to be aware of the laws governing spellcraft, they are aware of your actions.

  • Understand the abstract motivations of another living creature which allows you to touch it. You are able to intuit their immediate goals expressed in the form of a single verb.

  • Intensely focus on your current objective and the means of achieving it. You receive a brief hint or reminder from the Gamemaster about that objective containing only information which you have previously learned.

Motivate may only affect a creature or object which you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Inspire Heroism.name: Inspire Heroism
Inspire Heroism.description: Your courageous presence inspires your nearby allies to strike with confidence.

Inspire Heroism.name: Inspire Heroism
Inspire Heroism.description: Each ally, excluding yourself, within 10 Feet gains +1 Boon to actions performed until the end of their next Turn.

Gesture: Strike.name: Gesture: Strike
Gesture: Strike.description:
You empower a direct close-range attack with the arcane essence of a Rune, performing a Strike with your equipped weapon.

The Strike gesture scales using Strength and deal damage based on your used weapon but with the damage type of the incorporated Rune. This gesture does not require any free hand and has a base cost of 1 Focus in addition to the cost of your weapon Strike.

Gesture: Step.name: Gesture: Step
Gesture: Step.description:
You infuse runic power into a movement, crossing physical and spatial boundaries.

The Step gesture scales with Dexterity and allows you to move up to 20 feet in a straight line with width equal to your Size. It deals 2 Base Damage to targets along that line which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture does not require any free hands to cast and has a base cost of 3 Action and 1 Focus.

Playtest Notes

The movement aspect of this talent is not yet automated and must be manually performed as a consequence of the spell.

Corruption Absorption.name: Corruption Absorption
Corruption Absorption.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} has an exceptional ability to shrug off the effects of Death magic. Its Corruption resistance is doubled and if that resistance would reduce an amount of damage below zero, the negative amount is received as Healing instead.

Rune: Death.name: Rune: Death
Rune: Death.description:
The orderly force of destruction, responsible for the corruption of all biological matter. The Death rune governs decay and destruction.

The Death rune scales using Presence, targets Fortitude, and deals Corruption damage to Health. It is opposed by the chaotic rune of Life.

Ennervate.name: Ennervate
Ennervate.description:
Your command of the Rune of Death allows for basic communion with the dead and for rudimentary manipulation of unholy forces, producing one of the following effects:

  • Spread decay over an object no larger than a 1-foot cube, causing plants to wither, metallic objects to rust, wood to become rotten, food to grow foul, or a corpse to rapidly decompose. Magical objects are typically unaffected.

  • Cause a corpse which has been dead for less than seven days or otherwise preserved to perform a lifeless reenactment of its final moments. Its movements imitate those that occurred during the creature's final 30 seconds of life. You have no control over the creature nor can it communicate in any other way.

  • Hasten the death of a willing creature that is currently dying, causing it to pass swiftly and peacefully.

Ennervate may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Gesture: Influence.name: Gesture: Influence
Gesture: Influence.description:
You intensify the arcane power of a Rune into a concentrated direct contact which is generally a more powerful evolution of the basic Touch gesture.

The Influence gesture scales using Presence and targets a single adjacent creature. It deals 10 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 3 Action and 1 Focus.

Gesture: Arrow.name: Gesture: Arrow
Gesture: Arrow.description:
You hurl a projectile imbued with the magical power of a Rune at a distant target.

The Arrow gesture scales using Intellect and targets a single creature up to a distance of 60 feet, dealing 8 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 3 Action and 1 Focus.

Acid Absorption.name: Acid Absorption
Acid Absorption.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} has an exceptional ability to thrive within acidic environments. Its Acid resistance is doubled and if that resistance would reduce an amount of damage below zero, the negative amount is received as Healing instead.

Gesture: Fan.name: Gesture: Fan
Gesture: Fan.description:
You shape the essence of a Rune into a sweeping or splintered arc to strike multiple targets in close proximity.

The Fan gesture scales using Intellect and targets a 120 degree arc with 6 foot radius. It deals 6 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 3 Action and 1 Focus.

Gesture: Aspect.name: Gesture: Aspect
Gesture: Aspect.description:
You infuse the essence of a Rune into your body, empowering your own physical form or psyche.

When you assume a certain Aspect, you become more closely attuned to the damage type of the Rune used in your spell. You gain +2 Resistance to that damage type, and deal an additional +2 Damage whenever dealing damage of that type.

Your Aspect lasts for 6 Rounds. You may only have one active Aspect, casting another spell using the Aspect gesture replaces the previous effect. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 2 Action and 1 Focus.

Rune: Earth.name: Rune: Earth
Rune: Earth.description:
The orderly force of elemental earth, responsible for physical matter. The Earth rune governs minerals, metals, soils, and other physical compounds.

The Earth rune scales using Wisdom, targets Reflex, and deals Acid damage to Health. It is opposed by the chaotic rune of Lightning.

Mould.name: Mould
Mould.description:
Your command of the Rune of Earth allows you to manipulate raw forces of rock, mineral, and soil in basic ways, producing one of the following effects:

  • Quickly shape up to one cubic foot of available material into a simple geometric form like a cuboid, ellipsoid, or polyhedron.

  • Precisely copy the physical shape of a held object that is smaller than a 6-inch cube, reproducing it from available clay, stone, or metal. The replica retains no useful properties except for its physical form.

  • Separate and collect earthen particles from the surface of an object, creature, or liquid that you touch, rendering the subject completely cleaned or purified in moments.

Mould may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

archetype.name: Elemental Visitor
archetype.description: Visitors are embodiments of raw elemental energy that assume forms that are vaguely humanoid in shape. Unlike their lesser kin, Elemental Visitors are are capable of communication and understanding, although their motivations are seldom aligned with those of mortals.

taxonomy.name: Earth Elemental
taxonomy.description: Elemental creatures corresponding to the element of Earth.

Fire Absorption.name: Fire Absorption
Fire Absorption.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} has an exceptional ability to thrive within scorching environments. Its Fire resistance is doubled and if that resistance would reduce an amount of damage below zero, the negative amount is received as Healing instead.

Gesture: Fan.name: Gesture: Fan
Gesture: Fan.description:
You shape the essence of a Rune into a sweeping or splintered arc to strike multiple targets in close proximity.

The Fan gesture scales using Intellect and targets a 120 degree arc with 6 foot radius. It deals 6 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 3 Action and 1 Focus.

Gesture: Aspect.name: Gesture: Aspect
Gesture: Aspect.description:
You infuse the essence of a Rune into your body, empowering your own physical form or psyche.

When you assume a certain Aspect, you become more closely attuned to the damage type of the Rune used in your spell. You gain +2 Resistance to that damage type, and deal an additional +2 Damage whenever dealing damage of that type.

Your Aspect lasts for 6 Rounds. You may only have one active Aspect, casting another spell using the Aspect gesture replaces the previous effect. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 2 Action and 1 Focus.

Rune: Flame.name: Rune: Flame
Rune: Flame.description:
The chaotic force of elemental, thermal energy. The Flame rune governs fire and heat.

The Flame rune scales using Intellect, targets Reflex, and deals Fire damage to Health. It is opposed by the orderly rune of Frost.

Enkindle.name: Enkindle
Enkindle.description:
Your command of the Rune of Flame allows you to manipulate fire and thermal energy in creative ways, producing one of the following effects:

  • Manifest a burst of elemental flame in one inch sphere which can ignite a candle, torch, or other flammable materials.

  • Imbue your body with momentary thermal shielding which provides you with immunity to fire damage on an immediately subsequent action that costs 1 Action or less.

  • Control the movement of flames within a small area, causing them to flicker, dance, or shift in an animated performance of light and shadow.

Enkindle may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

archetype.name: Elemental Visitor
archetype.description: Visitors are embodiments of raw elemental energy that assume forms that are vaguely humanoid in shape. Unlike their lesser kin, Elemental Visitors are are capable of communication and understanding, although their motivations are seldom aligned with those of mortals.

taxonomy.name: Fire Elemental
taxonomy.description: Elemental creatures corresponding to the element of Fire.

Cold Absorption.name: Cold Absorption
Cold Absorption.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} has an exceptional ability to thrive within frigid environments. Its Cold resistance is doubled and if that resistance would reduce an amount of damage below zero, the negative amount is received as Healing instead.

Amorphous.name: Amorphous
Amorphous.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} may move through a space as narrow as 1 inch in diameter without any penalty to its Stride. It gains a bonus to Dodge equal to half its Toughness score and is immune to the @Condition[restrained] condition.

Rune: Frost.name: Rune: Frost
Rune: Frost.description:
The orderly force of water and cold. The Frost rune governs the creation of water or other fluids and their transfer between liquid and frozen states.

The Frost rune scales using Wisdom, targets Fortitude, and deals Cold damage to Health. It is opposed by the chaotic rune of Flame.

Condense.name: Condense
Condense.description:
Your command of the Rune of Frost allows you to manipulate liquids and their thermal properties, producing one of the following effects:

  • Draw up to one quarter gallon of fresh water from the atmosphere into a container or upon a surface you touch. The created water may be affected by relevant atmospheric properties of your current location.

  • Manipulate the temperature of up to 1 gallon of water, causing it to immediately freeze or thaw. The water need not be in a container; this technique can be used to coat a surface or join two objects together via regelation. Ice created in this way remains frozen for as long as the ambient temperature of the environment allows.

  • Gather up to a six-foot cube of nearby snow, forming it into a solidified sculpture, shape, or shelter.

Condense may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Aqueous Transmission.name: Aqueous Transmission
Aqueous Transmission.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} is able to move instantaneously through water.

Aqueous Transmission.name: Aqueous Transmission
Aqueous Transmission.description: When the @ref[actor.name]{creature} is within water, it can instantaneously transport itself to any unoccupied space within the same body of water up to 120 feet away. It does not need to be able to see the destination to make this Move.

Gesture: Fan.name: Gesture: Fan
Gesture: Fan.description:
You shape the essence of a Rune into a sweeping or splintered arc to strike multiple targets in close proximity.

The Fan gesture scales using Intellect and targets a 120 degree arc with 6 foot radius. It deals 6 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 3 Action and 1 Focus.

Gesture: Aspect.name: Gesture: Aspect
Gesture: Aspect.description:
You infuse the essence of a Rune into your body, empowering your own physical form or psyche.

When you assume a certain Aspect, you become more closely attuned to the damage type of the Rune used in your spell. You gain +2 Resistance to that damage type, and deal an additional +2 Damage whenever dealing damage of that type.

Your Aspect lasts for 6 Rounds. You may only have one active Aspect, casting another spell using the Aspect gesture replaces the previous effect. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 2 Action and 1 Focus.

archetype.name: Elemental Visitor
archetype.description: Visitors are embodiments of raw elemental energy that assume forms that are vaguely humanoid in shape. Unlike their lesser kin, Elemental Visitors are are capable of communication and understanding, although their motivations are seldom aligned with those of mortals.

taxonomy.name: Frost Elemental
taxonomy.description: Elemental creatures corresponding to the element of Frost.

Rune: Illumination.name: Rune: Illumination
Rune: Illumination.description:
The orderly force of light and energy. The Illumination rune governs light and radiance.

The Illumination rune scales using Presence, targets Reflex, and deals Radiant damage to Health. It is opposed by the chaotic rune of Illusion.

Reveal.name: Reveal
Reveal.description:
Your command of the Rune of Illumination allows you to create light and exert basic control over its radiance, producing one of the following effects:

  • Create a ball of light called a "tosslight" which sheds bright light in a 20 foot radius and dim light in a 40 foot radius. The light can hover near your body, be affixed to an item or surface, or be thrown up to a distance of 30 feet. You may dismiss your tosslight at any time and may only have a single tosslight at a time, casting this spell again causes your previous tosslight to disappear.

  • Inscribe up to 200 words of invisible text into paper like a scroll, page, or book. The text is written from light itself and hidden from non-magical detection. It can be made visible by yourself or another through use of this spell combined with a spoken passphrase that you define at the time of inscription.

  • Touch a physical object that produces dim light, causing it to become bright light for as long as you maintain physical contact. Only one light source may be intensified in this way at a given time.

Reveal may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Radiant Absorption.name: Radiant Absorption
Radiant Absorption.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} is no stranger to the chaotic force of light. Its Radiant resistance is doubled and if that resistance would reduce an amount of damage below zero, the negative amount is received as Healing instead.

Gesture: Strike.name: Gesture: Strike
Gesture: Strike.description:
You empower a direct close-range attack with the arcane essence of a Rune, performing a Strike with your equipped weapon.

The Strike gesture scales using Strength and deal damage based on your used weapon but with the damage type of the incorporated Rune. This gesture does not require any free hand and has a base cost of 1 Focus in addition to the cost of your weapon Strike.

Gesture: Step.name: Gesture: Step
Gesture: Step.description:
You infuse runic power into a movement, crossing physical and spatial boundaries.

The Step gesture scales with Dexterity and allows you to move up to 20 feet in a straight line with width equal to your Size. It deals 2 Base Damage to targets along that line which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture does not require any free hands to cast and has a base cost of 3 Action and 1 Focus.

Playtest Notes

The movement aspect of this talent is not yet automated and must be manually performed as a consequence of the spell.

Rune: Illusion.name: Rune: Illusion
Rune: Illusion.description:
The chaotic force of trickery and whimsy. The illusion rune governs magical manifestations of falsehood or misdirection.

The Illusion rune scales using Intellect, targets Willpower defense, and deals Psychic damage to Morale. It is opposed by the orderly rune of Illumination.

Seeming.name: Seeming
Seeming.description:
Your command of the Rune of Illusion allows you to fabricate perception in various simple ways and to manipulate shadow and light to create distraction or entertainment, producing one of the following effects:

  • Modify a single aspect of your own physical appearance. Such alterations might include adjusting the sound of your voice, changing the color of your eyes, gaining illusory horns, or appearing slightly taller or shorter. The alteration persists until you Rest or enact a different alteration and can be verified as illusory by physical inspection.

  • Manifest a convincing recreation of a short sound or single scent that you can clearly recall. The illusion originates from your position and lasts for 10 seconds. You can control the volume of the sound or odorousness of the scent to be perceptible up to a range of 60 feet or shorter.

  • Decouple your shadow from your form, specifically controlling its movements separately from your own. You can maintain this illusion as long as you do not perform any other action that consumes Focus.

Seeming may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Psychic Absorption.name: Psychic Absorption
Psychic Absorption.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} is exceptionally unyielding to attacks on its mind. Its Psychic resistance is doubled and if that resistance would reduce an amount of damage below zero, the negative amount is received as Healing instead.

Gesture: Strike.name: Gesture: Strike
Gesture: Strike.description:
You empower a direct close-range attack with the arcane essence of a Rune, performing a Strike with your equipped weapon.

The Strike gesture scales using Strength and deal damage based on your used weapon but with the damage type of the incorporated Rune. This gesture does not require any free hand and has a base cost of 1 Focus in addition to the cost of your weapon Strike.

Gesture: Step.name: Gesture: Step
Gesture: Step.description:
You infuse runic power into a movement, crossing physical and spatial boundaries.

The Step gesture scales with Dexterity and allows you to move up to 20 feet in a straight line with width equal to your Size. It deals 2 Base Damage to targets along that line which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture does not require any free hands to cast and has a base cost of 3 Action and 1 Focus.

Playtest Notes

The movement aspect of this talent is not yet automated and must be manually performed as a consequence of the spell.

Rune: Kinesis.name: Rune: Kinesis
Rune: Kinesis.description:
The chaotic force of space and physical movement. The Kinesis rune governs all things related to the act of movement and physicality.

The Kinesis rune scales using Presence, targets Physical defense, and deals Bludgeoning, Piercing, or Slashing damage to Health. It is opposed by the orderly rune of Control.

Propel.name: Propel
Propel.description:
Your command of the Rune of Kinesis allows you to exert local control over gravitational forces to perform basic telekinetic manipulations, producing one of the following effects:

  • Pull an unsecured object within 15 feet and with weight no greater than 1 towards you and catch it. An object that is equipped or possessed by a creature is never treated as unsecured unless that creature is willing to release it.

  • Flick an object that you hold with weight no greater than 1 towards a target up to 30 feet away. The object flies unerringly in a straight line towards that target at a moderate speed. Any creature along the object's path can react to catch it as long as they have a free hand with which to do so.

  • Suspend in midair an object or willing creature that you touch with weight less than or equal to 10 times your Presence, altering its position up to 20 feet in any direction from its original location. You can maintain this suspension indefinitely as long as you take no further Action and are not @Condition[incapacitated].

Propel may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch unless otherwise specified. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Self-Repair.name: Self-Repair
Self-Repair.description: The @ref[actor.name]{construct} activates internal repairing mechanisms to mitigate damage it has taken.

Self-Repair.name: Self-Repair
Self-Repair.description: The construct recovers its Toughness value in Health and immediately ends a single status condition of its choice that is currently affecting it.

Gesture: Strike.name: Gesture: Strike
Gesture: Strike.description:
You empower a direct close-range attack with the arcane essence of a Rune, performing a Strike with your equipped weapon.

The Strike gesture scales using Strength and deal damage based on your used weapon but with the damage type of the incorporated Rune. This gesture does not require any free hand and has a base cost of 1 Focus in addition to the cost of your weapon Strike.

Gesture: Step.name: Gesture: Step
Gesture: Step.description:
You infuse runic power into a movement, crossing physical and spatial boundaries.

The Step gesture scales with Dexterity and allows you to move up to 20 feet in a straight line with width equal to your Size. It deals 2 Base Damage to targets along that line which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture does not require any free hands to cast and has a base cost of 3 Action and 1 Focus.

Playtest Notes

The movement aspect of this talent is not yet automated and must be manually performed as a consequence of the spell.

Rune: Life.name: Rune: Life
Rune: Life.description:
A chaotic force of creation, responsible for living matter. The Life rune governs health and matters relating to biological growth.

The Life rune scales using Wisdom and provides Restoration of Health. In special circumstances it may be used to inflict Poison damage opposed by Fortitude. It is opposed by the orderly rune of Death.

Bloom.name: Bloom
Bloom.description:
Your command of the Rune of Life allows you to stimulate biological growth and nourish physical health, producing one of the following effects:

  • Cultivate 1 cubic foot of existing plants or fungus to rapidly grow to a healthy, blossoming, or harvestable state.

  • Identify a negative physical condition that is affecting a creature such as @Condition[diseased], @Condition[poisoned], @Condition[bleeding], or @Condition[weakened].

  • Verify whether a portion of food or drink is free of contamination from bacteria, parasites, or poison.

Bloom may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Mender.name: Mender
Mender.description:
You are highly skilled in weaving the Rune of Life. Spells which use this Rune cause the @Condition[mending] condition on Critical Hits.

The Mending effect lasts for 1 Round and deals your Wisdom score as additional Restoration to Health.

Gesture: Influence.name: Gesture: Influence
Gesture: Influence.description:
You intensify the arcane power of a Rune into a concentrated direct contact which is generally a more powerful evolution of the basic Touch gesture.

The Influence gesture scales using Presence and targets a single adjacent creature. It deals 10 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 3 Action and 1 Focus.

Gesture: Arrow.name: Gesture: Arrow
Gesture: Arrow.description:
You hurl a projectile imbued with the magical power of a Rune at a distant target.

The Arrow gesture scales using Intellect and targets a single creature up to a distance of 60 feet, dealing 8 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 3 Action and 1 Focus.

Rune: Oblivion.name: Rune: Oblivion
Rune: Oblivion.description:
A chaotic force of destruction and annihilation of existence. The Oblivion rune governs unmaking of matter or decoherence of spirit.

The Oblivion rune scales using Intellect, targets Willpower, and deals Void damage to Morale. It is opposed by the orderly rune of Soul.

Erase.name: Erase
Erase.description:
Your command of the Rune of Oblivion allows you to unravel tiny holes in the fabric of existence, producing one of the following effects:

  • Disintegrate a non-magical object you hold smaller than a 6-inch cube, sundering it to a fine particulate dust of its component elements.

  • Anesthetize the ability to feel emotion from yourself or a willing target that you touch, causing it to enter a placid, stoic, or dispassionate state. This effect can be maintained as long as you make no further Action.

  • Subdue the potency of a light source, causing its visible radius to be reduced by half for as long as you maintain physical contact with it. Only one light source may be dampened in this way at a given time.

Erase may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Void Absorption.name: Void Absorption
Void Absorption.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} is no stranger to the orderly force of darkness. Its Void resistance is doubled and if that resistance would reduce an amount of damage below zero, the negative amount is received as Healing instead.

Gesture: Influence.name: Gesture: Influence
Gesture: Influence.description:
You intensify the arcane power of a Rune into a concentrated direct contact which is generally a more powerful evolution of the basic Touch gesture.

The Influence gesture scales using Presence and targets a single adjacent creature. It deals 10 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 3 Action and 1 Focus.

Gesture: Arrow.name: Gesture: Arrow
Gesture: Arrow.description:
You hurl a projectile imbued with the magical power of a Rune at a distant target.

The Arrow gesture scales using Intellect and targets a single creature up to a distance of 60 feet, dealing 8 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 3 Action and 1 Focus.

Rune: Soul.name: Rune: Soul
Rune: Soul.description:
An orderly force of creation and spiritual essence. The Soul rune governs the fundamental procession of souls through life and death and relates to matters of sapience, personality, and mental health.

The Soul rune scales using Presence and provides Restoration of Morale. In special circumstances it may be used to inflict Psychic damage opposed by Willpower. It is opposed by the chaotic rune of Oblivion.

Evoke.name: Evoke
Evoke.description:
Your command of the Rune of Soul allows you to facilitate basic forms of spiritual influence, producing one of the following effects:

  • Enable yourself or another willing person to revisit a core memory of a moment from their past up to one minute in duration as if it happened recently.

  • Identify a negative spiritual condition that is affecting a person such as @Condition[broken], @Condition[frightened], @Condition[confused], or @Condition[insane].

  • Create a momentary spiritual connection with another willing creature that allows them to recognize an idea which can be expressed as a single word.

Uses of Evoke may only affect yourself or another creature which you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Gesture: Influence.name: Gesture: Influence
Gesture: Influence.description:
You intensify the arcane power of a Rune into a concentrated direct contact which is generally a more powerful evolution of the basic Touch gesture.

The Influence gesture scales using Presence and targets a single adjacent creature. It deals 10 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 3 Action and 1 Focus.

Gesture: Arrow.name: Gesture: Arrow
Gesture: Arrow.description:
You hurl a projectile imbued with the magical power of a Rune at a distant target.

The Arrow gesture scales using Intellect and targets a single creature up to a distance of 60 feet, dealing 8 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 3 Action and 1 Focus.

Inspirator.name: Inspirator
Inspirator.description:
You are highly skilled in weaving the Rune of Soul. Spells which use this Rune cause the @Condition[inspired] condition on Critical Hits.

The Inspired effect lasts for 1 Round and deals your Presence score as additional Restoration to Morale.

Rune: Lightning.name: Rune: Lightning
Rune: Lightning.description:
The chaotic force of raw electrical energy. The Lightning rune governs sources of electrical charge and discharge.

The Lightning rune scales using Intellect, targets Reflex, and deals Electrical damage to Health. It is opposed by the orderly rune of Earth.

Energize.name: Energize
Energize.description:
Your command of the Rune of Lightning allows you to conduct the flow of both air and electricity, manipulating charge and aerodynamics to produce one of the following effects:

  • Instill an electromagnetic charge into a metallic object that you touch no larger than a one-foot cube, causing it to strongly adhere to other metals. Only one object can be charged in this way at a given time, casting this spell on a different object causes the prior object to lose its magnetic effect.

  • Gather a squall of wind at your current location in a six-foot radius which blows either as a gust in a single controlled direction or as a cyclone with centripetal force in all directions. Airborne effects in the immediate area are dispersed and unsecured objects with weight less than 1 are flung in the direction of the gust.

  • Produce the concussive sound of a thunderclap at a location you can see within 15 feet of your current position.

Energize may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Electricity Absorption.name: Electricity Absorption
Electricity Absorption.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} has an exceptional ability to take lightning blasts in stride. Its Electricity resistance is doubled and if that resistance would reduce an amount of damage below zero, the negative amount is received as Healing instead.

Gesture: Fan.name: Gesture: Fan
Gesture: Fan.description:
You shape the essence of a Rune into a sweeping or splintered arc to strike multiple targets in close proximity.

The Fan gesture scales using Intellect and targets a 120 degree arc with 6 foot radius. It deals 6 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 3 Action and 1 Focus.

Gesture: Aspect.name: Gesture: Aspect
Gesture: Aspect.description:
You infuse the essence of a Rune into your body, empowering your own physical form or psyche.

When you assume a certain Aspect, you become more closely attuned to the damage type of the Rune used in your spell. You gain +2 Resistance to that damage type, and deal an additional +2 Damage whenever dealing damage of that type.

Your Aspect lasts for 6 Rounds. You may only have one active Aspect, casting another spell using the Aspect gesture replaces the previous effect. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 2 Action and 1 Focus.

archetype.name: Elemental Visitor
archetype.description: Visitors are embodiments of raw elemental energy that assume forms that are vaguely humanoid in shape. Unlike their lesser kin, Elemental Visitors are are capable of communication and understanding, although their motivations are seldom aligned with those of mortals.

taxonomy.name: Storm Elemental
taxonomy.description: Elemental creatures corresponding to the element of Lightning.

Constrict.name: Constrict
Constrict.description: The creature attempts to squeeze the life out of its target. It makes a weakened athletics attack against its target; on a hit the target becomes Restrained and begins to Suffocate while restrained this way. This Hold can be broken by a athletics attack against the fortitude of the creature by the target or another creature within engagement range.

Rune: Control.name: Rune: Control
Rune: Control.description:
The orderly force of discipline and permanence. The Control rune governs thought, reason, and persistence.

The Control rune scales using Wisdom, targets Willpower, and deals Psychic damage to Morale. It is opposed by the chaotic rune of Kinesis.

Motivate.name: Motivate
Motivate.description:
Your command of the Rune of Control allows you to affect the decision making of others in basic ways, producing one of the following effects:

  • Moderately intensify or dampen the primary emotion being felt by a creature you touch. If the creature is intelligent enough to be aware of the laws governing spellcraft, they are aware of your actions.

  • Understand the abstract motivations of another living creature which allows you to touch it. You are able to intuit their immediate goals expressed in the form of a single verb.

  • Intensely focus on your current objective and the means of achieving it. You receive a brief hint or reminder from the Gamemaster about that objective containing only information which you have previously learned.

Motivate may only affect a creature or object which you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Inspire Heroism.name: Inspire Heroism
Inspire Heroism.description: Your courageous presence inspires your nearby allies to strike with confidence.

Inspire Heroism.name: Inspire Heroism
Inspire Heroism.description: Each ally, excluding yourself, within 10 Feet gains +1 Boon to actions performed until the end of their next Turn.

Immutable Form.name: Immutable Form
Immutable Form.description: The @ref[actor.name] is immune to any spell or effect which alters its physical form.

Rune: Control.name: Rune: Control
Rune: Control.description:
The orderly force of discipline and permanence. The Control rune governs thought, reason, and persistence.

The Control rune scales using Wisdom, targets Willpower, and deals Psychic damage to Morale. It is opposed by the chaotic rune of Kinesis.

Motivate.description:

Motivate may only affect a creature or object which you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Gesture: Step.description:

The Step gesture scales with Dexterity and allows you to move up to 20 feet in a straight line with width equal to your Size. Playtest Notes

The movement aspect of this talent is not yet automated and must be manually performed as a consequence of the spell.

Flight.name: Flight
Flight.description: This creature gains a fly speed equal to its stride.

Acid Breath.name: Acid Breath
Acid Breath.description: The creature has salivary glands which produce a caustic acidic spray.

Breath.name: Breath
Breath.description:
The creature expels a spray of acidic bile in a 30 foot line.

On a Critical Hit, this attack causes the @Condition[corroding] condition for 3 Turns.

Shapeshift.name: Shapeshift
Shapeshift.description: The Creature Shapeshifts into the shape of a humanoid or beast that is equal or lower than it in level.

Shapeshift.name: Shapeshift
Shapeshift.description: The Creature Shapeshifts into a humanoid or beast of its level or lower.

Slowing Breath.name: Slowing Breath
Slowing Breath.description: The Dragon exhales gas in a 10ft fan Slowing targets.

Slowing Breath.name: Slowing Breath
Slowing Breath.description: The Dragon exhales gas in a 10ft fan causing the Slowed Condition on a hit.

False Appearance.name: False Appearance
False Appearance.description: While it remains motionless, the @ref[actor.name]{creature} is indistinguishable from some other object or material.

False Appearance.name: False Appearance
False Appearance.description: While it remains motionless, the @ref[actor.name]{creature} is indistinguishable from some other object or material.

False Appearance.name: False Appearance
False Appearance.description: While it remains motionless, the @ref[actor.name]{creature} is indistinguishable from some other object or material.

Grab.name: Grab
Grab.description: The creature attempts to grab a creature with its whip like tendrils and squeeze the life from it.

Grab.name: Grab
Grab.description: The creature Wraps its whip like tendrils around its target. If the attack is successful and the target is equal or lesser in Size, the target is also Restrained until this creature chooses to release it or the restraint is otherwise broken. Only one target my be restrained by this action at a time.

Squeeze.name: Squeeze
Squeeze.description: Once the creature has a enemy restrained, it will constrict tightly dealing terrible damage to the grasped victim.

Constrict.name: Constrict
Constrict.description: The Creature deals Deadly damage to a target that it currently has Restrained.

Flight.name: Flight
Flight.description: This creature gains a fly speed equal to its stride.

Rune: Soul.name: Rune: Soul
Rune: Soul.description:
An orderly force of creation and spiritual essence. The Soul rune governs the fundamental procession of souls through life and death and relates to matters of sapience, personality, and mental health.

The Soul rune scales using Presence and provides Restoration of Morale. In special circumstances it may be used to inflict Psychic damage opposed by Willpower. It is opposed by the chaotic rune of Oblivion.

Evoke.name: Evoke
Evoke.description:
Your command of the Rune of Soul allows you to facilitate basic forms of spiritual influence, producing one of the following effects:

  • Enable yourself or another willing person to revisit a core memory of a moment from their past up to one minute in duration as if it happened recently.

  • Identify a negative spiritual condition that is affecting a person such as @Condition[broken], @Condition[frightened], @Condition[confused], or @Condition[insane].

  • Create a momentary spiritual connection with another willing creature that allows them to recognize an idea which can be expressed as a single word.

Uses of Evoke may only affect yourself or another creature which you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Gesture: Sense.name: Gesture: Sense
Gesture: Sense.description:
You attune your mind to the arcane power of a Rune to sense nearby sources of energy.

The Sense gesture scales with Presence and produces an emanation with 30 feet radius and position that remains centered upon the spellcaster. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 3 Action and 1 Focus. It may optionally be Maintained at the additional cost of 1 Focus every subsequent round.

This spell allows the caster to detect the presence of spellcraft using the same Rune as the one incorporated in this spell. The sense will also momentarily detect the presence of creatures according to their type.

  • Control: Fiends

  • Death: Undead

  • Earth: Oozes and Earth Elementals

  • Flame: Dragons and Fire Elementals

  • Frost: Giants and Frost Elementals

  • Illumination: Celestials

  • Illusion: Fey

  • Kinesis: Monstrosities

  • Life: Plants and Beasts

  • Lightning: Constructs and Storm Elementals

  • Oblivion: Outsiders

  • Soul: Humanoids

Constrict.name: Constrict
Constrict.description: The Creature attempts to Squeeze the life out of its target.

Constrict.name: Constrict
Constrict.description: The creature attempts to squeeze the life out of its target. It makes a weakened athletics attack against its target; on a hit the target becomes Restrained and begins to Suffocate while restrained this way. This Hold can be broken by a athletics attack against the fortitude of the creature by the target or another creature within engagement range.

Mental Fortress.name: Mental Fortress
Mental Fortress.description: Your strong will makes you exceedingly difficult to influence. You gain +1 to your Willpower defense and +5 resistance to Psychic damage.

Gesture: Aura.name: Gesture: Aura
Gesture: Aura.description:
You concentrate the arcane power of a Rune to create a maintained field of energy that washes over allies and enemies near to you.

The Aura gesture scales with Presence and produces an emanation with 20 feet radius centered on the spellcaster. The center of this Aura moves with the spellcaster.

Depending on the Rune used, the Aura deals damage or provides healing to any creature which begins its turn inside the Aura. This gesture requires 2 Hands to cast, has a base cost of 5 Action and 1 Focus, and must be Maintained costing an additional 1 Focus every subsequent round.

Playtest Notes

This talent is currently placed at a Tier 4 node. It will eventually only be attainable at a higher level (probably Level 6 required). It is currently available "early" for testing.

Emanation templates which are linked to the Token and move when the Token moves are a feature coming in Foundry VTT version 14. Automation of the Aura gesture will occur once Crucible depends on Foundry VTT version 14.

Counter Riposte.name: Counter Riposte
Counter Riposte.condition: You Parry an incoming melee Strike.
Counter Riposte.description: When you defend against a melee attack with a Parry, you may react and expend Focus to retaliate with a reduced-cost Strike which benefits from the Exposed condition.

Counterspell.name: Counterspell
Counterspell.condition: Another creature which you can see is casting a spell.
Counterspell.description:
You form arcane energy into a countervailing spellcraft, targeting a spellcaster you can see within 30 feet.

Designate a Rune and Gesture which you know to attempt to counter the spell. Choosing a Rune which is opposed to one used in the spell grants +2 Boons to your attempt. Selecting the identical Gesture as the one being cast also adds +2 Boons to your attempt.

Perform a harmless Spell Attack against your target's Willpower defense. If your roll exceeds their defense, the spell is countered and its magic is nullified, producing no effects.

Rune: Control.name: Rune: Control
Rune: Control.description:
The orderly force of discipline and permanence. The Control rune governs thought, reason, and persistence.

The Control rune scales using Wisdom, targets Willpower, and deals Psychic damage to Morale. It is opposed by the chaotic rune of Kinesis.

  • Moderately intensify or dampen the primary emotion being felt by a creature you touch. If the creature is intelligent enough to be aware of the laws governing spellcraft, they are aware of your actions.

  • Understand the abstract motivations of another living creature which allows you to touch it. You are able to intuit their immediate goals expressed in the form of a single verb.

  • Intensely focus on your current objective and the means of achieving it. You receive a brief hint or reminder from the Gamemaster about that objective containing only information which you have previously learned.

Motivate may only affect a creature or object which you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.
