Its movements imitate those that occurred during the creature's final 30 seconds of life. You have no control over the creature nor can it communicate in any other way.

  • Hasten the death of a willing creature that is currently dying, causing it to pass swiftly and peacefully.

Ennervate may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Gesture: Influence.name: Gesture: Influence
Gesture: Influence.description:
You intensify the arcane power of a Rune into a concentrated direct contact which is generally a more powerful evolution of the basic Touch gesture.

The Influence gesture scales using Presence and targets a single adjacent creature. It deals 10 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 3 Action and 1 Focus.

Gesture: Arrow.name: Gesture: Arrow
Gesture: Arrow.description:
You hurl a projectile imbued with the magical power of a Rune at a distant target.

The Arrow gesture scales using Intellect and targets a single creature up to a distance of 60 feet, dealing 8 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 3 Action and 1 Focus.

Corruption Absorption.name: Corruption Absorption
Corruption Absorption.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} has an exceptional ability to shrug off the effects of Death magic. Its Corruption resistance is doubled and if that resistance would reduce an amount of damage below zero, the negative amount is received as Healing instead.

Rune: Death.name: Rune: Death
Rune: Death.description:
The orderly force of destruction, responsible for the corruption of all biological matter. The Death rune governs decay and destruction.

The Death rune scales using Presence, targets Fortitude, and deals Corruption damage to Health. It is opposed by the chaotic rune of Life.

Ennervate.name: Ennervate
Ennervate.description:
Your command of the Rune of Death allows for basic communion with the dead and for rudimentary manipulation of unholy forces, producing one of the following effects:

  • Spread decay over an object no larger than a 1-foot cube, causing plants to wither, metallic objects to rust, wood to become rotten, food to grow foul, or a corpse to rapidly decompose. Magical objects are typically unaffected.

  • Cause a corpse which has been dead for less than seven days or otherwise preserved to perform a lifeless reenactment of its final moments. Its movements imitate those that occurred during the creature's final 30 seconds of life. You have no control over the creature nor can it communicate in any other way.

  • Hasten the death of a willing creature that is currently dying, causing it to pass swiftly and peacefully.

Ennervate may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Gesture: Arrow.name: Gesture: Arrow
Gesture: Arrow.description:
You hurl a projectile imbued with the magical power of a Rune at a distant target.

The Arrow gesture scales using Intellect and targets a single creature up to a distance of 60 feet, dealing 8 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 3 Action and 1 Focus.

Gesture: Cone.name: Gesture: Cone
Gesture: Cone.description:
You focus the arcane power of a Rune into a narrow cone that projects outwards from your location.

The Cone gesture scales with Intellect and produces a 60 degree cone with a 30 foot radius originating from the spellcaster. The Cone deals 8 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture requires 2 Hands to cast and has a base cost of 5 Action and 2 Focus.

Playtest Notes

This talent is currently placed at a Tier 4 node. It will eventually only be attainable at a higher level (probably Level 6 required). It is currently available "early" for testing.

Gesture: Sense.name: Gesture: Sense
Gesture: Sense.description:
You attune your mind to the arcane power of a Rune to sense nearby sources of energy.

The Sense gesture scales with Presence and produces an emanation with 30 feet radius and position that remains centered upon the spellcaster. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 3 Action and 1 Focus. It may optionally be Maintained at the additional cost of 1 Focus every subsequent round.

This spell allows the caster to detect the presence of spellcraft using the same Rune as the one incorporated in this spell. The sense will also momentarily detect the presence of creatures according to their type.

  • Control: Fiends

  • Death: Undead

  • Earth: Oozes and Earth Elementals

  • Flame: Dragons and Fire Elementals

  • Frost: Giants and Frost Elementals

  • Illumination: Celestials

  • Illusion: Fey

  • Kinesis: Monstrosities

  • Life: Plants and Beasts

  • Lightning: Constructs and Storm Elementals

  • Oblivion: Outsiders

  • Soul: Humanoids

Gesture: Ward.name: Gesture: Ward
Gesture: Ward.description:
You shape the arcane power of a Rune into a protective barrier used to shield yourself from harm.

The Ward gesture scales using Toughness and provides +6 Resistance against the damage type of the Rune used in the spell. This resistance lasts for 1 Round and you may only have a single Ward at a time. Casting another spell using the Ward gesture replaces your prior Ward. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 2 Action and 1 Focus.

Snakeblood.name: Snakeblood
Snakeblood.description: Your supernatural toughness makes you resistant to venoms and toxins. You gain +5 Resistance to Poison damage.

Light Sensitivity.name: Light Sensitivity
Light Sensitivity.description: The creature suffers banes to all actions when exposed to Bright Light.

Shield Combat Training.name: Shield Combat Training
Shield Combat Training.description: You are practiced at fighting with shield, using it to slam into and imbalance your foes. You are Trained with weapons in the Shield category.

Shield Bash.name: Shield Bash
Shield Bash.description: Following a basic Strike with your mainhand weapon, you Strike with your shield, causing the @Condition[staggered] condition for one Round.

Bulwark.name: Bulwark
Bulwark.description:
You have expertise in using a Shield to defend yourself and others.

Once per Turn while you have a Shield equipped, you may use the Defend action at a reduced cost of 1 Action Point.

Intercept.name: Intercept
Intercept.description: You protect your allies, intercepting blows that might otherwise be directed towards your companions.

Intercept.name: Intercept
Intercept.condition: An enemy moves into or through your Engagement radius.
Intercept.description:
You intercept the path of an enemy which enters your Engagement radius, immediatly moving up to your Stride to interpose yourself and block their path.

If the enemy moves out of your Engagement radius or attacks any other creature during their turn, you may make a Disengagement Strike against them.

Hold Fast.name: Hold Fast
Hold Fast.description: You are a calm anchor in the swirling sea of combat. When you have a Shield equipped, your Engagement increases by +1, allowing you to simultaneously engage more adjacent foes.

description.public: Built to crush plate and shatter shields, the war hammer features a heavy, blunt head mounted atop a reinforced haft, delivering ruin in the hands of those who favor power over finesse.
A massive, rectangular wall of wood and metal, the tower shield turns its bearer into a walking fortress, ideal for holding choke points—but at the cost of speed and vision.
Overlapping metal plates sewn or riveted onto a leather or cloth backing, scale mail resembles the hide of a dragon and protects well against cuts and stabs—though it's noisy and inflexible.

archetype.name: Protector
archetype.description: Stalwart warriors who interpose themselves between their allies and peril, seeking foremost to protect themselves and others from harm.

Rune: Life.name: Rune: Life
Rune: Life.description:
A chaotic force of creation, responsible for living matter. The Life rune governs health and matters relating to biological growth.

The Life rune scales using Wisdom and provides Restoration of Health. In special circumstances it may be used to inflict Poison damage opposed by Fortitude. It is opposed by the orderly rune of Death.

Bloom.name: Bloom
Bloom.description:
Your command of the Rune of Life allows you to stimulate biological growth and nourish physical health, producing one of the following effects:

  • Cultivate 1 cubic foot of existing plants or fungus to rapidly grow to a healthy, blossoming, or harvestable state.

  • Identify a negative physical condition that is affecting a creature such as @Condition[diseased], @Condition[poisoned], @Condition[bleeding], or @Condition[weakened].

  • Verify whether a portion of food or drink is free of contamination from bacteria, parasites, or poison.

Bloom may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Rune: Illumination.name: Rune: Illumination
Rune: Illumination.description:
The orderly force of light and energy. The Illumination rune governs light and radiance.

The Illumination rune scales using Presence, targets Reflex, and deals Radiant damage to Health. It is opposed by the chaotic rune of Illusion.

Reveal.name: Reveal
Reveal.description:
Your command of the Rune of Illumination allows you to create light and exert basic control over its radiance, producing one of the following effects:

  • Create a ball of light called a "tosslight" which sheds bright light in a 20 foot radius and dim light in a 40 foot radius. The light can hover near your body, be affixed to an item or surface, or be thrown up to a distance of 30 feet. You may dismiss your tosslight at any time and may only have a single tosslight at a time, casting this spell again causes your previous tosslight to disappear.

  • Inscribe up to 200 words of invisible text into paper like a scroll, page, or book. The text is written from light itself and hidden from non-magical detection. It can be made visible by yourself or another through use of this spell combined with a spoken passphrase that you define at the time of inscription.

  • Touch a physical object that produces dim light, causing it to become bright light for as long as you maintain physical contact. Only one light source may be intensified in this way at a given time.

Reveal may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Rune: Earth.name: Rune: Earth
Rune: Earth.description:
The orderly force of elemental earth, responsible for physical matter. The Earth rune governs minerals, metals, soils, and other physical compounds.

The Earth rune scales using Wisdom, targets Reflex, and deals Acid damage to Health. It is opposed by the chaotic rune of Lightning.

Mould.name: Mould
Mould.description:
Your command of the Rune of Earth allows you to manipulate raw forces of rock, mineral, and soil in basic ways, producing one of the following effects:

  • Quickly shape up to one cubic foot of available material into a simple geometric form like a cuboid, ellipsoid, or polyhedron.

  • Precisely copy the physical shape of a held object that is smaller than a 6-inch cube, reproducing it from available clay, stone, or metal. The replica retains no useful properties except for its physical form.

  • Separate and collect earthen particles from the surface of an object, creature, or liquid that you touch, rendering the subject completely cleaned or purified in moments.

Mould may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Rune: Flame.name: Rune: Flame
Rune: Flame.description:
The chaotic force of elemental, thermal energy. The Flame rune governs fire and heat.

The Flame rune scales using Intellect, targets Reflex, and deals Fire damage to Health. It is opposed by the orderly rune of Frost.

Enkindle.name: Enkindle
Enkindle.description:
Your command of the Rune of Flame allows you to manipulate fire and thermal energy in creative ways, producing one of the following effects:

  • Manifest a burst of elemental flame in one inch sphere which can ignite a candle, torch, or other flammable materials.

  • Imbue your body with momentary thermal shielding which provides you with immunity to fire damage on an immediately subsequent action that costs 1 Action or less.

  • Control the movement of flames within a small area, causing them to flicker, dance, or shift in an animated performance of light and shadow.

Enkindle may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Rune: Lightning.name: Rune: Lightning
Rune: Lightning.description:
The chaotic force of raw electrical energy. The Lightning rune governs sources of electrical charge and discharge.

The Lightning rune scales using Intellect, targets Reflex, and deals Electrical damage to Health. It is opposed by the orderly rune of Earth.

Energize.name: Energize
Energize.description:
Your command of the Rune of Lightning allows you to conduct the flow of both air and electricity, manipulating charge and aerodynamics to produce one of the following effects:

  • Instill an electromagnetic charge into a metallic object that you touch no larger than a one-foot cube, causing it to strongly adhere to other metals. Only one object can be charged in this way at a given time, casting this spell on a different object causes the prior object to lose its magnetic effect.

  • Gather a squall of wind at your current location in a six-foot radius which blows either as a gust in a single controlled direction or as a cyclone with centripetal force in all directions. Airborne effects in the immediate area are dispersed and unsecured objects with weight less than 1 are flung in the direction of the gust.

  • Produce the concussive sound of a thunderclap at a location you can see within 15 feet of your current position.

Energize may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Gesture: Arrow.name: Gesture: Arrow
Gesture: Arrow.description:
You hurl a projectile imbued with the magical power of a Rune at a distant target.

The Arrow gesture scales using Intellect and targets a single creature up to a distance of 60 feet, dealing 8 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 3 Action and 1 Focus.

Gesture: Influence.name: Gesture: Influence
Gesture: Influence.description:
You intensify the arcane power of a Rune into a concentrated direct contact which is generally a more powerful evolution of the basic Touch gesture.

The Influence gesture scales using Presence and targets a single adjacent creature. It deals 10 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 3 Action and 1 Focus.

Counterspell.name: Counterspell
Counterspell.description:
You immediately react to a spell being cast and compose a rune and gesture designed to unravel and negate the spellcraft of an enemy mage.

Playtest Notes

This action can now be used in playtesting, but it is not yet fully automated. The Counterspell can be performed, but it is up to the Gamemaster to manually reverse a previously applied spell and to manually deduct its Action and Focus cost. These steps of the overall Counterspell workflow will be automated in a subsequent update such that a confirmed Counterspell will also confirm the spell that was countered, but with its effects removed.

Counterspell.name: Counterspell
Counterspell.condition: Another creature which you can see is casting a spell.
Counterspell.description:
You form arcane energy into a countervailing spellcraft, targeting a spellcaster you can see within 30 feet.

Designate a Rune and Gesture which you know to attempt to counter the spell. Choosing a Rune which is opposed to one used in the spell grants +2 Boons to your attempt. Selecting the identical Gesture as the one being cast also adds +2 Boons to your attempt.

Perform a harmless Spell Attack against your target's Willpower defense. If your roll exceeds their defense, the spell is countered and its magic is nullified, producing no effects.

Heavy Weapon Training.name: Heavy Weapon Training
Heavy Weapon Training.description: You know how to use a heavy weapon to deliver punishing blows, putting your entire strength behind every swing. You are Trained with all weapons in the Heavy and Balanced categories.

Heavy Strike.name: Heavy Strike
Heavy Strike.description: You unleash a powerful Strike with your mainhand weapon. The attack is slower to execute, but is Empowered to deliver additional damage.

Inspire Heroism.name: Inspire Heroism
Inspire Heroism.description: Your courageous presence inspires your nearby allies to strike with confidence.

Inspire Heroism.name: Inspire Heroism
Inspire Heroism.description: Each ally, excluding yourself, within 10 Feet gains +1 Boon to actions performed until the end of their next Turn.

Heavy Weapon Proficiency.name: Heavy Weapon Proficiency
Heavy Weapon Proficiency.description: You have a fluent education in the use of martial weaponry. You gain the Journeyman training rank and a +1 Skill Bonus with weapons in the Simple, Heavy, and Balanced categories.

Concussive Blows.name: Concussive Blows
Concussive Blows.description:
Your physical power wielding melee weapons which deal Bludgeoning damage can cause the Staggered condition on Critical Hits which deal damage to Health.

The Staggered effect lasts for 1 round and reduces your target's maximum Action by 1.

description.public: Built to crush plate and shatter shields, the war hammer features a heavy, blunt head mounted atop a reinforced haft, delivering ruin in the hands of those who favor power over finesse.

Returning.name: Returning
Returning.description: A thrown weapon with this affix magically returns to the wielder's hand after each attack, allowing it to be thrown again without needing to retrieve it.

Keen.name: Keen
Keen.description: Reduce the Critical Threshold needed to obtain a Critical Hit on a successful Strike. This threshold is reduced by 1 for each Tier of this affix.

Potency.name: Potency
Potency.description: Adds an Enchantment Bonus to all Strikes which use this weapon based on the Tier of the affix.

Reinforcement.name: Reinforcement
Reinforcement.description: Increase Armor defense by 1 for each Tier of this suffix.

Inflection: Extend.name: Inflection: Extend
Inflection: Extend.description:
Enhance the duration of a spell, increasing the duration of its effect. For spells which are instantaneous, any corresponding status conditions that they cause are increased in duration.

Effect duration increases from the Extend inflection are not yet automated in Playtest 1. This inflection is included as an example of the intended direction for the Spellcraft system.

Inflection: Determine.name: Inflection: Determine
Inflection: Determine.description: Enhance a spell to make it more difficult to counter. Any attempt to Counter-Spell this spell is made with +2 Banes.

Surgeweaver.name: Surgeweaver
Surgeweaver.description:
You are highly skilled in weaving the Rune of Lightning. Spells which use this Rune cause the @Condition[shocked] condition on Critical Hits.

The Shocked effect lasts for 1 Round, deals half your Intellect score as Lightning damage to Morale, and applies the @Condition[staggered] condition.

Mender.name: Mender
Mender.description:
You are highly skilled in weaving the Rune of Life. Spells which use this Rune cause the @Condition[mending] condition on Critical Hits.

The Mending effect lasts for 1 Round and deals your Wisdom score as additional Restoration to Health.

Gesture: Aura.name: Gesture: Aura
Gesture: Aura.description:
You concentrate the arcane power of a Rune to create a maintained field of energy that washes over allies and enemies near to you.

The Aura gesture scales with Presence and produces an emanation with 20 feet radius centered on the spellcaster. The center of this Aura moves with the spellcaster.

Depending on the Rune used, the Aura deals damage or provides healing to any creature which begins its turn inside the Aura. This gesture requires 2 Hands to cast, has a base cost of 5 Action and 1 Focus, and must be Maintained costing an additional 1 Focus every subsequent round.

Playtest Notes

This talent is currently placed at a Tier 4 node. It will eventually only be attainable at a higher level (probably Level 6 required). It is currently available "early" for testing.

Emanation templates which are linked to the Token and move when the Token moves are a feature coming in Foundry VTT version 14. Automation of the Aura gesture will occur once Crucible depends on Foundry VTT version 14.

Gesture: Pulse.name: Gesture: Pulse
Gesture: Pulse.description:
Expel the arcane power of a Rune in a radius that travels outward with you at its center.

The Pulse gesture scales using Presence and produces an emanation with 10 foot radius, dealing 8 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. The gesture requires 2 Hands to cast and has a base cost of 5 Action and 2 Focus.

Playtest Notes

This talent is currently placed at a Tier 4 node. It will eventually only be attainable at a higher level (probably Level 6 required). It is currently available "early" for testing.

Inflection: Reshape.name: Inflection: Reshape
Inflection: Reshape.description:
Enhance a Spell by carefully reshaping and controlling its area of effect at the cost of 2 Focus.

Offensive spells which use a template target only target enemies within the area. Healing spells which use a template target only target allies within the area.

Single target spells do not incur any Banes due to intervening creatures.

Inflection: React.name: Inflection: React
Inflection: React.description: Instinctually compose a spell as a Reaction in response to some other action that you observe. The React inflection increases the Focus cost of a spell by 2.

Illumination Proficiency.name: Illumination Proficiency
Illumination Proficiency.description:
You have fluency in weaving spellcraft using the Rune of Illumination. You gain a +1 Skill Bonus for spells cast using this Rune.

Playtest Notes

This talent will eventually also provide an upgrade to the Reveal action, expanding its effectiveness or including new options for how to use it.

Lightning Proficiency.name: Lightning Proficiency
Lightning Proficiency.description:
You have fluency in weaving spellcraft using the Rune of Lightning. You gain a +1 Skill Bonus for spells cast using this Rune.

Playtest Notes

This talent will eventually also provide an upgrade to the Energize action, expanding its effectiveness or including new options for how to use it.

Gloom Sight.name: Gloom Sight
Gloom Sight.description:
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} can gaze into the gloom of total darkness and see normally. Magical darkness does not impede the creature's vision.

System Development: This feature needs automation to configure vision and detection modes that are unaffected by magical darkness.

Teleport.name: Teleport
Teleport.description: The Creature teleports to a empty location within 120ft.

Teleport.name: Teleport
Teleport.description: The creature teleports to a empty location within 120ft

Flaming Death Burst.name: Flaming Death Burst
Flaming Death Burst.description: When the @ref[actor.name]{creature} dies, it explodes in a volatile burst of fire.

Flaming Death Burst.name: Flaming Death Burst
Flaming Death Burst.description: When the @ref[actor.name]{creature} becomes @Condition[dead], it explodes in a blast of Fire which attacks the Reflex defense of all nearby creatures that fail to resist the effect and upon critical success afflicting them with the @Condition[burning] condition for 3 rounds.

Rune: Flame.name: Rune: Flame
Rune: Flame.description:
The chaotic force of elemental, thermal energy. The Flame rune governs fire and heat.

The Flame rune scales using Intellect, targets Reflex, and deals Fire damage to Health. It is opposed by the orderly rune of Frost.

Enkindle.name: Enkindle
Enkindle.description:
Your command of the Rune of Flame allows you to manipulate fire and thermal energy in creative ways, producing one of the following effects:

  • Manifest a burst of elemental flame in one inch sphere which can ignite a candle, torch, or other flammable materials.

  • Imbue your body with momentary thermal shielding which provides you with immunity to fire damage on an immediately subsequent action that costs 1 Action or less.

  • Control the movement of flames within a small area, causing them to flicker, dance, or shift in an animated performance of light and shadow.

Enkindle may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

description.public: A bastard sword, also known as a hand-and-a-half sword, is a versatile weapon with a straight, double-edged blade around 40 inches long. This weapon is forged for both single-handed agility and two-handed power.

Electricity Conversion.name: Electricity Conversion
Electricity Conversion.description:
A portion of the damage dealt by strikes with this weapon is converted to Electricity damage. The proportion converted depends on the Tier of this prefix.

  • Tier 1: 33% of damage converted

  • Tier 2: 66% of damage converted

  • Tier 3: 100% of damage converted

Playtest Notes

The infrastructure for splitting a single attack into multiple typed damage components does not yet exist. Until it does, all tiers of this affix convert 100% of the weapon's damage to Electricity. Once multi-type damage is supported, lower tiers will convert only a fraction of the total damage, leaving the remainder as the weapon's original type.

Potency.name: Potency
Potency.description: Adds an Enchantment Bonus to all Strikes which use this weapon based on the Tier of the affix.

description.public: A sturdy and flexible chain affixed with a barbed hook at its end. In the hands of a skilled combatant the chain can be thrown towards a target, tearing at their flesh or equipment.

Potency.name: Potency
Potency.description: Adds an Enchantment Bonus to all Strikes which use this weapon based on the Tier of the affix.

Keen.name: Keen
Keen.description: Reduce the Critical Threshold needed to obtain a Critical Hit on a successful Strike. This threshold is reduced by 1 for each Tier of this affix.

Fire Conversion.name: Fire Conversion
Fire Conversion.description:
A portion of the damage dealt by strikes with this weapon is converted to Fire damage. The proportion converted depends on the Tier of this prefix.

  • Tier 1: 33% of damage converted

  • Tier 2: 66% of damage converted

  • Tier 3: 100% of damage converted

Playtest Notes

The infrastructure for splitting a single attack into multiple typed damage components does not yet exist. Until it does, all tiers of this affix convert 100% of the weapon's damage to Fire. Once multi-type damage is supported, lower tiers will convert only a fraction of the total damage, leaving the remainder as the weapon's original type.

Reinforcement.name: Reinforcement
Reinforcement.description: Increase Armor defense by 1 for each Tier of this suffix.

Gesture: Aura.name: Gesture: Aura
Gesture: Aura.description:
You concentrate the arcane power of a Rune to create a maintained field of energy that washes over allies and enemies near to you.

The Aura gesture scales with Presence and produces an emanation with 20 feet radius centered on the spellcaster. The center of this Aura moves with the spellcaster.

Depending on the Rune used, the Aura deals damage or provides healing to any creature which begins its turn inside the Aura. This gesture requires 2 Hands to cast, has a base cost of 5 Action and 1 Focus, and must be Maintained costing an additional 1 Focus every subsequent round.

Playtest Notes

This talent is currently placed at a Tier 4 node. It will eventually only be attainable at a higher level (probably Level 6 required). It is currently available "early" for testing.

Emanation templates which are linked to the Token and move when the Token moves are a feature coming in Foundry VTT version 14. Automation of the Aura gesture will occur once Crucible depends on Foundry VTT version 14.

Flight.name: Flight
Flight.description: This creature gains a fly speed equal to its stride.

Rune: Illumination.name: Rune: Illumination
Rune: Illumination.description:
The orderly force of light and energy. The Illumination rune governs light and radiance.

The Illumination rune scales using Presence, targets Reflex, and deals Radiant damage to Health. It is opposed by the chaotic rune of Illusion.

Reveal.name: Reveal
Reveal.description:
Your command of the Rune of Illumination allows you to create light and exert basic control over its radiance, producing one of the following effects:

  • Create a ball of light called a "tosslight" which sheds bright light in a 20 foot radius and dim light in a 40 foot radius. The light can hover near your body, be affixed to an item or surface, or be thrown up to a distance of 30 feet. You may dismiss your tosslight at any time and may only have a single tosslight at a time, casting this spell again causes your previous tosslight to disappear.

  • Inscribe up to 200 words of invisible text into paper like a scroll, page, or book. The text is written from light itself and hidden from non-magical detection. It can be made visible by yourself or another through use of this spell combined with a spoken passphrase that you define at the time of inscription.

  • Touch a physical object that produces dim light, causing it to become bright light for as long as you maintain physical contact. Only one light source may be intensified in this way at a given time.

Reveal may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Gesture: Influence.name: Gesture: Influence
Gesture: Influence.description:
You intensify the arcane power of a Rune into a concentrated direct contact which is generally a more powerful evolution of the basic Touch gesture.

The Influence gesture scales using Presence and targets a single adjacent creature. It deals 10 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 3 Action and 1 Focus.

Rune: Life.name: Rune: Life
Rune: Life.description:
A chaotic force of creation, responsible for living matter. The Life rune governs health and matters relating to biological growth.

The Life rune scales using Wisdom and provides Restoration of Health. In special circumstances it may be used to inflict Poison damage opposed by Fortitude. It is opposed by the orderly rune of Death.

Bloom.name: Bloom
Bloom.description:
Your command of the Rune of Life allows you to stimulate biological growth and nourish physical health, producing one of the following effects:

  • Cultivate 1 cubic foot of existing plants or fungus to rapidly grow to a healthy, blossoming, or harvestable state.

  • Identify a negative physical condition that is affecting a creature such as @Condition[diseased], @Condition[poisoned], @Condition[bleeding], or @Condition[weakened].

  • Verify whether a portion of food or drink is free of contamination from bacteria, parasites, or poison.

Bloom may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Shapeshift.name: Shapeshift
Shapeshift.description: The Creature Shapeshifts into the shape of a humanoid or beast that is equal or lower than it in level.

Shapeshift.name: Shapeshift
Shapeshift.description: The Creature Shapeshifts into a humanoid or beast of its level or lower.

Gesture: Sense.name: Gesture: Sense
Gesture: Sense.description:
You attune your mind to the arcane power of a Rune to sense nearby sources of energy.

The Sense gesture scales with Presence and produces an emanation with 30 feet radius and position that remains centered upon the spellcaster. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 3 Action and 1 Focus. It may optionally be Maintained at the additional cost of 1 Focus every subsequent round.

This spell allows the caster to detect the presence of spellcraft using the same Rune as the one incorporated in this spell. The sense will also momentarily detect the presence of creatures according to their type.

  • Control: Fiends

  • Death: Undead

  • Earth: Oozes and Earth Elementals

  • Flame: Dragons and Fire Elementals

  • Frost: Giants and Frost Elementals

  • Illumination: Celestials

  • Illusion: Fey

  • Kinesis: Monstrosities

  • Life: Plants and Beasts

  • Lightning: Constructs and Storm Elementals

  • Oblivion: Outsiders

  • Soul: Humanoids

Rune: Control.name: Rune: Control
Rune: Control.description:
The orderly force of discipline and permanence. The Control rune governs thought, reason, and persistence.

The Control rune scales using Wisdom, targets Willpower, and deals Psychic damage to Morale. It is opposed by the chaotic rune of Kinesis.

Motivate.name: Motivate
Motivate.description:
Your command of the Rune of Control allows you to affect the decision making of others in basic ways, producing one of the following effects:

  • Moderately intensify or dampen the primary emotion being felt by a creature you touch. If the creature is intelligent enough to be aware of the laws governing spellcraft, they are aware of your actions.

  • Understand the abstract motivations of another living creature which allows you to touch it. You are able to intuit their immediate goals expressed in the form of a single verb.

  • Intensely focus on your current objective and the means of achieving it. You receive a brief hint or reminder from the Gamemaster about that objective containing only information which you have previously learned.

Motivate may only affect a creature or object which you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Gesture: Strike.name: Gesture: Strike
Gesture: Strike.description:
You empower a direct close-range attack with the arcane essence of a Rune, performing a Strike with your equipped weapon.

The Strike gesture scales using Strength and deal damage based on your used weapon but with the damage type of the incorporated Rune. This gesture does not require any free hand and has a base cost of 1 Focus in addition to the cost of your weapon Strike.

description.public: A one-handed blunt weapon that features a heavy head, typically forged of metal, which converts the momentum of its wielder's swing into a bone-shattering impact.

Gloom Sight.name: Gloom Sight
Gloom Sight.description:
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} can gaze into the gloom of total darkness and see normally. Magical darkness does not impede the creature's vision.

System Development: This feature needs automation to configure vision and detection modes that are unaffected by magical darkness.

description.public: A polearm with a curved, sword-like blade affixed to the end of a long shaft, the glaive sweeps through foes in broad, arcing strikes.

Steadfast.name: Steadfast
Steadfast.description: Your patient resolve allows you to endure psychologically grueling ordeals with steadfast determination.

Steadfast Resolve.name: Steadfast Resolve
Steadfast Resolve.description: You harden yourself against demoralization. Your Morale is increased by your Wisdom score and you temporarily gain the Resolute condition.

Gloom Sight.name: Gloom Sight
Gloom Sight.description:
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} can gaze into the gloom of total darkness and see normally. Magical darkness does not impede the creature's vision.

System Development: This feature needs automation to configure vision and detection modes that are unaffected by magical darkness.

Rune: Flame.name: Rune: Flame
Rune: Flame.description:
The chaotic force of elemental, thermal energy. The Flame rune governs fire and heat.

The Flame rune scales using Intellect, targets Reflex, and deals Fire damage to Health. It is opposed by the orderly rune of Frost.

Enkindle.name: Enkindle
Enkindle.description:
Your command of the Rune of Flame allows you to manipulate fire and thermal energy in creative ways, producing one of the following effects:

  • Manifest a burst of elemental flame in one inch sphere which can ignite a candle, torch, or other flammable materials.

  • Imbue your body with momentary thermal shielding which provides you with immunity to fire damage on an immediately subsequent action that costs 1 Action or less.

  • Control the movement of flames within a small area, causing them to flicker, dance, or shift in an animated performance of light and shadow.

Enkindle may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Potency.name: Potency
Potency.description: Adds an Enchantment Bonus to all Strikes which use this weapon based on the Tier of the affix.

Poison Conversion.name: Poison Conversion
Poison Conversion.description:
A portion of the damage dealt by strikes with this weapon is converted to Poison damage. The proportion converted depends on the Tier of this prefix.

  • Tier 1: 33% of damage converted

  • Tier 2: 66% of damage converted

  • Tier 3: 100% of damage converted

Playtest Notes

The infrastructure for splitting a single attack into multiple typed damage components does not yet exist. Until it does, all tiers of this affix convert 100% of the weapon's damage to Poison. Once multi-type damage is supported, lower tiers will convert only a fraction of the total damage, leaving the remainder as the weapon's original type.

Keen.name: Keen
Keen.description: Reduce the Critical Threshold needed to obtain a Critical Hit on a successful Strike. This threshold is reduced by 1 for each Tier of this affix.

Potency.name: Potency
Potency.description: Adds an Enchantment Bonus to all Strikes which use this weapon based on the Tier of the affix.

Potency.name: Potency
Potency.description: Adds an Enchantment Bonus to all Strikes which use this weapon based on the Tier of the affix.

description.public: A one-handed blunt weapon that features a heavy head, typically forged of metal, which converts the momentum of its wielder's swing into a bone-shattering impact.

Potency.name: Potency
Potency.description: Adds an Enchantment Bonus to all Strikes which use this weapon based on the Tier of the affix.

Gesture: Blast.name: Gesture: Blast
Gesture: Blast.description:
You hurl the arcane power of a Rune into an intense explosion of energy at a nearby point you can see.

The Blast gesture scales with Intellect and produces a blast with 6 feet radius centered on a point within 60 feet of the spellcaster. The blast deals 8 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture requires 2 Hands to cast and has a base cost of 5 Action and 2 Focus.

Playtest Notes

This talent is currently placed at a Tier 4 node. It will eventually only be attainable at a higher level (probably Level 6 required). It is currently available "early" for testing.

Gloom Sight.name: Gloom Sight
Gloom Sight.description:
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} can gaze into the gloom of total darkness and see normally. Magical darkness does not impede the creature's vision.

System Development: This feature needs automation to configure vision and detection modes that are unaffected by magical darkness.

Horrifying Visage.name: Horrifying Visage
Horrifying Visage.description: The Creature wails targeting each creature in a 30ft cone. A creature hit by this is Confused for 1 minute.

Horrifying Visage.name: Horrifying Visage
Horrifying Visage.description: The Creature wails targeting each creature in a 30ft cone. A creature hit by this is Confused for 1 minute in addition to any damage dealt.

description.public: A sturdy and flexible chain affixed with a barbed hook at its end. In the hands of a skilled combatant the chain can be thrown towards a target, tearing at their flesh or equipment.

Gloom Sight.name: Gloom Sight
Gloom Sight.description:
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} can gaze into the gloom of total darkness and see normally. Magical darkness does not impede the creature's vision.

System Development: This feature needs automation to configure vision and detection modes that are unaffected by magical darkness.

Gesture: Arrow.name: Gesture: Arrow
Gesture: Arrow.description:
You hurl a projectile imbued with the magical power of a Rune at a distant target.

The Arrow gesture scales using Intellect and targets a single creature up to a distance of 60 feet, dealing 8 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 3 Action and 1 Focus.

Rune: Flame.name: Rune: Flame
Rune: Flame.description:
The chaotic force of elemental, thermal energy. The Flame rune governs fire and heat.

The Flame rune scales using Intellect, targets Reflex, and deals Fire damage to Health. It is opposed by the orderly rune of Frost.

Enkindle.name: Enkindle
Enkindle.description:
Your command of the Rune of Flame allows you to manipulate fire and thermal energy in creative ways, producing one of the following effects:

  • Manifest a burst of elemental flame in one inch sphere which can ignite a candle, torch, or other flammable materials.

  • Imbue your body with momentary thermal shielding which provides you with immunity to fire damage on an immediately subsequent action that costs 1 Action or less.

  • Control the movement of flames within a small area, causing them to flicker, dance, or shift in an animated performance of light and shadow.

Enkindle may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Diseasing Proboscis.name: Diseasing Proboscis
Diseasing Proboscis.description: The Creature Attacks its target inflicting the Diseased condition on a hit. This condition lasts until the target uses a Rest or Recover Action.

Corruption Absorption.name: Corruption Absorption
Corruption Absorption.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} has an exceptional ability to shrug off the effects of Death magic. Its Corruption resistance is doubled and if that resistance would reduce an amount of damage below zero, the negative amount is received as Healing instead.

Flight.name: Flight
Flight.description: This creature gains a fly speed equal to its stride.

Rotting Breath.name: Rotting Breath
Rotting Breath.description: The Dragon Breaths out a blast of necrotic gas rotting targets on contact.

Rotting Breath.name: Rotting Breath
Rotting Breath.description: The dragon breaths forth a blast of rotting gas dealing corruption damage to targets in a 10ft fan. On a crit the target gains the Decaying Condition for 3 turns.

Restless Dead.name: Restless Dead
Restless Dead.description:
The @ref[actor.name]{creature}'s life is sustained by necromantic magic or otherworldly forces. When it would be considered @Condition[dead] it is instead @Condition[incapacitated].

After the conclusion of combat, the @ref[actor.name]{creature} may begin to perform the Recover action, regaining consciousness after the recovery is complete. Recovery in this fashion may be prevented in one of the following ways:

  • The creature was incapacitated by a type of damage for which it is Vulnerable.

  • The magical forces which caused it to rise as undead are disrupted, countered, or otherwise dispelled.

  • The creature's body is destroyed to a degree that it can no longer maintain its physical form.

Amphibious.name: Amphibious
Amphibious.description: This creature can breath underwater in addition to air.

Steam Breath.name: Steam Breath
Steam Breath.description: The Creature breaths forth a blast of scalding hot air in a 20ft fan.

Steam Breath.name: Steam Breath
Steam Breath.description:
The Creature breaths forth a blast of scalding hot air in a 20ft fan.

On a Critical Hit, this attack causes the Burning condition for 3 turns.

Gloom Sight.name: Gloom Sight
Gloom Sight.description:
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} can gaze into the gloom of total darkness and see normally. Magical darkness does not impede the creature's vision.

System Development: This feature needs automation to configure vision and detection modes that are unaffected by magical darkness.

Poison Cloud.name: Poison Cloud
Poison Cloud.description: The Creature belches up a noxious cloud of gas.

Poison Cloud.name: Poison Cloud
Poison Cloud.description: The Creature makes a Toughness attack against the Fortitude defense of each creature within 5ft. This attack is harmless but causes the poisoned condition for 3 turns on a successful hit.

Drone.name: Drone
Drone.description: The creature lets out a long droning noise attacking the Willpower defense of all those who can hear within 20ft. On a hit the attack deals Psychic damage to moral and causes the Disoriented condition for 3 turns.

Rune: Life.name: Rune: Life
Rune: Life.description:
A chaotic force of creation, responsible for living matter. The Life rune governs health and matters relating to biological growth.

The Life rune scales using Wisdom and provides Restoration of Health. In special circumstances it may be used to inflict Poison damage opposed by Fortitude. It is opposed by the orderly rune of Death.

Bloom.name: Bloom
Bloom.description:
Your command of the Rune of Life allows you to stimulate biological growth and nourish physical health, producing one of the following effects:

  • Cultivate 1 cubic foot of existing plants or fungus to rapidly grow to a healthy, blossoming, or harvestable state.

  • Identify a negative physical condition that is affecting a creature such as @Condition[diseased], @Condition[poisoned], @Condition[bleeding], or @Condition[weakened].

  • Verify whether a portion of food or drink is free of contamination from bacteria, parasites, or poison.

Bloom may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Tree Stride.name: Tree Stride
Tree Stride.description: The Creature can step from one tree to another as if they were doorways.

Tree Stride.name: Tree Stride
Tree Stride.description: The Creature Steps from one tree within range 1 appearing next to another tree within 60ft of the first. Both trees must be larger than the the Creature.

Wildspeaker.name: Wildspeaker
Wildspeaker.description: You have a preternatural knack for communicating with animals. Through body language and sounds, you are capable of interpreting and communicating in the language of the wilderness.

Wildspeak.name: Wildspeak
Wildspeak.description:
If you succeed on a [[/skillCheck wilderness 14]] check, you may pose simple questions to a Beast which can perceive you. As long as the creature is not hostile it will respond accurately within the limits of its own knowledge.

  • Beasts with an Intellect score of zero are incapable of understanding you.

  • Beasts with an Intellect score of 1 can only respond with "yes" or "no" responses.

  • Beasts with an Intellect score greater than 1 can provide simple multi-word responses.

description.public: A crude yet effective weapon, the club is a blunt length of wood or bone designed to crush rather than cut. It can be a dangerous implement in the hands of even untrained fighters.

Rune: Earth.name: Rune: Earth
Rune: Earth.description:
The orderly force of elemental earth, responsible for physical matter. The Earth rune governs minerals, metals, soils, and other physical compounds.

The Earth rune scales using Wisdom, targets Reflex, and deals Acid damage to Health. It is opposed by the chaotic rune of Lightning.

Mould.name: Mould
Mould.description:
Your command of the Rune of Earth allows you to manipulate raw forces of rock, mineral, and soil in basic ways, producing one of the following effects:

  • Quickly shape up to one cubic foot of available material into a simple geometric form like a cuboid, ellipsoid, or polyhedron.

  • Precisely copy the physical shape of a held object that is smaller than a 6-inch cube, reproducing it from available clay, stone, or metal. The replica retains no useful properties except for its physical form.

  • Separate and collect earthen particles from the surface of an object, creature, or liquid that you touch, rendering the subject completely cleaned or purified in moments.

Mould may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Acid Absorption.name: Acid Absorption
Acid Absorption.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} has an exceptional ability to thrive within acidic environments. Its Acid resistance is doubled and if that resistance would reduce an amount of damage below zero, the negative amount is received as Healing instead.

Earth Walk.name: Earth Walk
Earth Walk.description: The Creature can burrow through natural earth at a speed equal to their stride. Burrowing in this way does not disturb the earth or leave behind a tunnel.

Unshakeable Stance.name: Unshakeable Stance
Unshakeable Stance.description: You cannot be unvoluntarily Moved or knocked Prone by any action that is not a Critical Success rolled by an enemy or a Critical Failure rolled by yourself.

Heavy Weapon Training.name: Heavy Weapon Training
Heavy Weapon Training.description: You know how to use a heavy weapon to deliver punishing blows, putting your entire strength behind every swing. You are Trained with all weapons in the Heavy and Balanced categories.

Heavy Strike.name: Heavy Strike
Heavy Strike.description: You unleash a powerful Strike with your mainhand weapon. The attack is slower to execute, but is Empowered to deliver additional damage.

Heavy Weapon Proficiency.name: Heavy Weapon Proficiency
Heavy Weapon Proficiency.description: You have a fluent education in the use of martial weaponry. You gain the Journeyman training rank and a +1 Skill Bonus with weapons in the Simple, Heavy, and Balanced categories.

Gesture: Create.name: Gesture: Create
Gesture: Create.description:
You coalesce arcane power into tangible form, manifesting a Sprite which appears within 10 feet and joins Combat at Initiative 1. Your Sprite is a Minion of half your own Level.

The Create gesture scales with Wisdom and the Sprite survives for 6 Rounds. You may only have one active Sprite, casting another spell using the Create gesture replaces your previous Sprite. This gesture requires 2 Hands to cast and has a base cost of 4 Action and 1 Focus.

Playtest Notes

Not all Runes have a Sprite actor defined yet. Runes that do not yet have a defined Creation will — for now — manifest a Flame Sprite.

Gesture: Conjure.name: Gesture: Conjure
Gesture: Conjure.description:
You coalesce arcane power into a superior form, manifesting a Visitor which appears within 30 feet and joins Combat at Initiative 1. Your Visitor is a Minion equal to your own Level.

The Conjure gesture scales with Wisdom and the Visitor survives for 12 Rounds. You may only have one active Visitor. Casting another spell using the Conjure gesture replaces your previous Visitor. This gesture requires 2 Hands to cast and has a base cost of 5 Action and 2 Focus.

Playtest Notes

This talent is currently placed at a Tier 4 node. It will eventually only be attainable at a higher level (probably Level 6 required). It is currently available "early" for testing.

Not all Runes have a Visitor actor defined yet. Runes that do not yet have a defined Conjuration will — for now — manifest a Flame Visitor.

Gesture: Sense.name: Gesture: Sense
Gesture: Sense.description:
You attune your mind to the arcane power of a Rune to sense nearby sources of energy.

The Sense gesture scales with Presence and produces an emanation with 30 feet radius and position that remains centered upon the spellcaster. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 3 Action and 1 Focus. It may optionally be Maintained at the additional cost of 1 Focus every subsequent round.

This spell allows the caster to detect the presence of spellcraft using the same Rune as the one incorporated in this spell. The sense will also momentarily detect the presence of creatures according to their type.

  • Control: Fiends

  • Death: Undead

  • Earth: Oozes and Earth Elementals

  • Flame: Dragons and Fire Elementals

  • Frost: Giants and Frost Elementals

  • Illumination: Celestials

  • Illusion: Fey

  • Kinesis: Monstrosities

  • Life: Plants and Beasts

  • Lightning: Constructs and Storm Elementals

  • Oblivion: Outsiders

  • Soul: Humanoids

description.public: This two-handed behemoth features a massive head of iron or stone, used to crush armor, bone, and will alike with every thunderous blow.

Strong Grip.name: Strong Grip
Strong Grip.description: Your grasp of your weaponry is firm and unyielding. You can perform Actions which require a free hand while wielding a two-handed melee weapon. Attempts to Disarm you are made with +2 Banes.

taxonomy.name: Earth Elemental
taxonomy.description: Elemental creatures corresponding to the element of Earth.

Acid Absorption.name: Acid Absorption
Acid Absorption.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} has an exceptional ability to thrive within acidic environments. Its Acid resistance is doubled and if that resistance would reduce an amount of damage below zero, the negative amount is received as Healing instead.

Mould may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

False Appearance.name: False Appearance
False Appearance.description: While it remains motionless, the @ref[actor.name]{creature} is indistinguishable from some other object or material.

archetype.name: Elemental Mote
archetype.description: Motes are the smallest elemental embodiments that still take physical form. They are generally unintelligent and act according to environmental stimuli or following the instinctual direction of a nearby greater elemental.

taxonomy.name: Earth Elemental
taxonomy.description: Elemental creatures corresponding to the element of Earth.

Acid Absorption.name: Acid Absorption
Acid Absorption.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} has an exceptional ability to thrive within acidic environments. Its Acid resistance is doubled and if that resistance would reduce an amount of damage below zero, the negative amount is received as Healing instead.

Gesture: Fan.name: Gesture: Fan
Gesture: Fan.description:
You shape the essence of a Rune into a sweeping or splintered arc to strike multiple targets in close proximity.

The Fan gesture scales using Intellect and targets a 120 degree arc with 6 foot radius. It deals 6 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 3 Action and 1 Focus.

Rune: Earth.name: Rune: Earth
Rune: Earth.description:
