The Arrow gesture scales using Intellect and targets a single creature up to a distance of 60 feet, dealing 8 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 3 Action and 1 Focus.

Gesture: Sense.name: Gesture: Sense
Gesture: Sense.description:
You attune your mind to the arcane power of a Rune to sense nearby sources of energy.

The Sense gesture scales with Presence and produces an emanation with 30 feet radius and position that remains centered upon the spellcaster. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 3 Action and 1 Focus. It may optionally be Maintained at the additional cost of 1 Focus every subsequent round.

This spell allows the caster to detect the presence of spellcraft using the same Rune as the one incorporated in this spell. The sense will also momentarily detect the presence of creatures according to their type.

  • Control: Fiends

  • Death: Undead

  • Earth: Oozes and Earth Elementals

  • Flame: Dragons and Fire Elementals

  • Frost: Giants and Frost Elementals

  • Illumination: Celestials

  • Illusion: Fey

  • Kinesis: Monstrosities

  • Life: Plants and Beasts

  • Lightning: Constructs and Storm Elementals

  • Oblivion: Outsiders

  • Soul: Humanoids

Gesture: Ward.name: Gesture: Ward
Gesture: Ward.description:
You shape the arcane power of a Rune into a protective barrier used to shield yourself from harm.

The Ward gesture scales using Toughness and provides +6 Resistance against the damage type of the Rune used in the spell. This resistance lasts for 1 Round and you may only have a single Ward at a time. Casting another spell using the Ward gesture replaces your prior Ward. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 2 Action and 1 Focus.

Inspirator.name: Inspirator
Inspirator.description:
You are highly skilled in weaving the Rune of Soul. Spells which use this Rune cause the @Condition[inspired] condition on Critical Hits.

The Inspired effect lasts for 1 Round and deals your Presence score as additional Restoration to Morale.

Gesture: Cone.name: Gesture: Cone
Gesture: Cone.description:
You focus the arcane power of a Rune into a narrow cone that projects outwards from your location.

The Cone gesture scales with Intellect and produces a 60 degree cone with a 30 foot radius originating from the spellcaster. The Cone deals 8 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture requires 2 Hands to cast and has a base cost of 5 Action and 2 Focus.

Playtest Notes

This talent is currently placed at a Tier 4 node. It will eventually only be attainable at a higher level (probably Level 6 required). It is currently available "early" for testing.

Spores.name: Spores
Spores.description: The creature makes a Weakened attack against scaling with Toughness against all creatures in a 15ft Pulse targeting Fortitude and dealing the Poisoned condition for 3 turns on a hit.

Constrict.name: Constrict
Constrict.description: The Creature deals Deadly damage to a target that it currently has Restrained.

Steadfast Resolve.name: Steadfast Resolve
Steadfast Resolve.description: You harden yourself against demoralization. Your Morale is increased by your Wisdom score and you temporarily gain the Resolute condition.

Steam Breath.name: Steam Breath
Steam Breath.description:
The Creature breaths forth a blast of scalding hot air in a 20ft fan.

On a Critical Hit, this attack causes the Burning condition for 3 turns.

Rune: Lightning.name: Rune: Lightning
Rune: Lightning.description:
The chaotic force of raw electrical energy. The Lightning rune governs sources of electrical charge and discharge.

The Lightning rune scales using Intellect, targets Reflex, and deals Electrical damage to Health. It is opposed by the orderly rune of Earth.

Energize.name: Energize
Energize.description:
Your command of the Rune of Lightning allows you to conduct the flow of both air and electricity, manipulating charge and aerodynamics to produce one of the following effects:

  • Instill an electromagnetic charge into a metallic object that you touch no larger than a one-foot cube, causing it to strongly adhere to other metals. Only one object can be charged in this way at a given time, casting this spell on a different object causes the prior object to lose its magnetic effect.

  • Gather a squall of wind at your current location in a six-foot radius which blows either as a gust in a single controlled direction or as a cyclone with centripetal force in all directions. Airborne effects in the immediate area are dispersed and unsecured objects with weight less than 1 are flung in the direction of the gust.

  • Produce the concussive sound of a thunderclap at a location you can see within 15 feet of your current position.

Energize may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Electricity Absorption.name: Electricity Absorption
Electricity Absorption.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} has an exceptional ability to take lightning blasts in stride. Its Electricity resistance is doubled and if that resistance would reduce an amount of damage below zero, the negative amount is received as Healing instead.

Gesture: Conjure.name: Gesture: Conjure
Gesture: Conjure.description:
You coalesce arcane power into a superior form, manifesting a Visitor which appears within 30 feet and joins Combat at Initiative 1. Your Visitor is a Minion equal to your own Level.

The Conjure gesture scales with Wisdom and the Visitor survives for 12 Rounds. You may only have one active Visitor. Casting another spell using the Conjure gesture replaces your previous Visitor. This gesture requires 2 Hands to cast and has a base cost of 5 Action and 2 Focus.

Playtest Notes

This talent is currently placed at a Tier 4 node. It will eventually only be attainable at a higher level (probably Level 6 required). It is currently available "early" for testing.

Not all Runes have a Visitor actor defined yet. Runes that do not yet have a defined Conjuration will — for now — manifest a Flame Visitor.

Gesture: Create.name: Gesture: Create
Gesture: Create.description:
You coalesce arcane power into tangible form, manifesting a Sprite which appears within 10 feet and joins Combat at Initiative 1. Your Sprite is a Minion of half your own Level.

The Create gesture scales with Wisdom and the Sprite survives for 6 Rounds. You may only have one active Sprite, casting another spell using the Create gesture replaces your previous Sprite. This gesture requires 2 Hands to cast and has a base cost of 4 Action and 1 Focus.

Playtest Notes

Not all Runes have a Sprite actor defined yet. Runes that do not yet have a defined Creation will — for now — manifest a Flame Sprite.

Gesture: Fan.name: Gesture: Fan
Gesture: Fan.description:
You shape the essence of a Rune into a sweeping or splintered arc to strike multiple targets in close proximity.

The Fan gesture scales using Intellect and targets a 120 degree arc with 6 foot radius. It deals 6 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 3 Action and 1 Focus.

Light Weapon Training.name: Light Weapon Training
Light Weapon Training.description: You know how to wield light weapons fluidly with a high degree of maneuverability and grace in combat. You are Trained with all weapons in the Light and Balanced categories.

Lunge.name: Lunge
Lunge.description:
You dart forward nimbly, making a strike with sudden and unexpected swiftness to perform a Strike with a weapon which scales using Dexterity against a single target, with an increased range of +2 feet.

The attack is Difficult, but you do not move from your current position nor does this attack provoke Disengagement.

Light Weapon Proficiency.name: Light Weapon Proficiency
Light Weapon Proficiency.description: You have a fluent education in the use of martial weaponry. You gain the Journeyman training rank and a +1 Skill Bonus with weapons in the Light and Balanced categories.

Hover.name: Hover
Hover.description: This creature may hover in the air, gaining a flying speed equal to their stride and being immune to the prone condition.

Gesture: Aura.name: Gesture: Aura
Gesture: Aura.description:
You concentrate the arcane power of a Rune to create a maintained field of energy that washes over allies and enemies near to you.

The Aura gesture scales with Presence and produces an emanation with 20 feet radius centered on the spellcaster. The center of this Aura moves with the spellcaster.

Depending on the Rune used, the Aura deals damage or provides healing to any creature which begins its turn inside the Aura. This gesture requires 2 Hands to cast, has a base cost of 5 Action and 1 Focus, and must be Maintained costing an additional 1 Focus every subsequent round.

Playtest Notes

This talent is currently placed at a Tier 4 node. It will eventually only be attainable at a higher level (probably Level 6 required). It is currently available "early" for testing.

Emanation templates which are linked to the Token and move when the Token moves are a feature coming in Foundry VTT version 14. Automation of the Aura gesture will occur once Crucible depends on Foundry VTT version 14.

Invisibility.name: Invisibility
Invisibility.description: A sophisticated use of Illusory magic, the Invisibility spell allows the caster to wrap light and shadow around themselves like donning a cloak, reflecting the world about them as if they were not standing there. What person wouldn't believe it when their own eyes tell them that there is nothing to see?

Invisibility.name: Invisibility
Invisibility.description: You become @Condition[invisible] and cannot be detected using sight-based perception. You cannot be directly targeted by any action. This spell must be Maintained in order to remain in effect.

description.public: With its wide, curved blade and deadly arc, the scimitar dances through battle, its edge carving through foes in sweeping, elegant strikes.

taxonomy.name: Storm Elemental
taxonomy.description: Elemental creatures corresponding to the element of Lightning.

False Appearance.name: False Appearance
False Appearance.description: While it remains motionless, the @ref[actor.name]{creature} is indistinguishable from some other object or material.

archetype.name: Elemental Mote
archetype.description: Motes are the smallest elemental embodiments that still take physical form. They are generally unintelligent and act according to environmental stimuli or following the instinctual direction of a nearby greater elemental.

taxonomy.name: Storm Elemental
taxonomy.description: Elemental creatures corresponding to the element of Lightning.

archetype.name: Elemental Sprite
archetype.description: Sprites are lesser elementals which are embodiments of their raw element, but lack the sapience of their greater kin.

taxonomy.description: Elemental creatures corresponding to the element of Lightning.

Gesture: Aspect.name: Gesture: Aspect
Gesture: Aspect.description:
You infuse the essence of a Rune into your body, empowering your own physical form or psyche.

When you assume a certain Aspect, you become more closely attuned to the damage type of the Rune used in your spell. You gain +2 Resistance to that damage type, and deal an additional +2 Damage whenever dealing damage of that type.

Your Aspect lasts for 6 Rounds. You may only have one active Aspect, casting another spell using the Aspect gesture replaces the previous effect. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 2 Action and 1 Focus.

archetype.name: Elemental Visitor
archetype.description: Visitors are embodiments of raw elemental energy that assume forms that are vaguely humanoid in shape. Unlike their lesser kin, Elemental Visitors are are capable of communication and understanding, although their motivations are seldom aligned with those of mortals.

taxonomy.name: Storm Elemental
taxonomy.description: Elemental creatures corresponding to the element of Lightning.

Rune: Lightning.description:

Gesture: Aspect.description:

When you assume a certain Aspect, you become more closely attuned to the damage type of the Rune used in your spell. You gain +2 Resistance to that damage type, and deal an additional +2 Damage whenever dealing damage of that type.

Your Aspect lasts for 6 Rounds. You may only have one active Aspect, casting another spell using the Aspect gesture replaces the previous effect. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 2 Action and 1 Focus.

Gesture: Step.name: Gesture: Step
Gesture: Step.description:
You infuse runic power into a movement, crossing physical and spatial boundaries.

The Step gesture scales with Dexterity and allows you to move up to 20 feet in a straight line with width equal to your Size. It deals 2 Base Damage to targets along that line which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture does not require any free hands to cast and has a base cost of 3 Action and 1 Focus.

Playtest Notes

The movement aspect of this talent is not yet automated and must be manually performed as a consequence of the spell.

Gesture: Strike.name: Gesture: Strike
Gesture: Strike.description:
You empower a direct close-range attack with the arcane essence of a Rune, performing a Strike with your equipped weapon.

The Strike gesture scales using Strength and deal damage based on your used weapon but with the damage type of the incorporated Rune. This gesture does not require any free hand and has a base cost of 1 Focus in addition to the cost of your weapon Strike.

Gesture: Pulse.name: Gesture: Pulse
Gesture: Pulse.description:
Expel the arcane power of a Rune in a radius that travels outward with you at its center.

The Pulse gesture scales using Presence and produces an emanation with 10 foot radius, dealing 8 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. The gesture requires 2 Hands to cast and has a base cost of 5 Action and 2 Focus.

Playtest Notes

This talent is currently placed at a Tier 4 node. It will eventually only be attainable at a higher level (probably Level 6 required). It is currently available "early" for testing.

archetype.name: Elemental Wanderer
archetype.description: Wanderers are significant manifestations of elemental energy that assume a form that is imposing or majestic. They are self-aware, sapient, and understand that they unnatural interlopers when outside of their typical realm. They are often driven by some instinctive or premeditated purpose which has drawn them forth.

taxonomy.name: Storm Elemental
taxonomy.description: Elemental creatures corresponding to the element of Lightning.

Stunning Screech.name: Stunning Screech
Stunning Screech.description: The Creature makes a harmless Toughness attack against the Willpower defense of every creature within 10ft that can hear them. Each creature that is hit becomes Stunned for 1 turn.

Subdivide.name: Subdivide
Subdivide.description:
The ooze's cells rapidly divide and the creature splits in two! The original creature and its clone equally divide its remaining Health. The Size of each resulting creature is decreased by 1.

If in combat, the new creature acts as a Summon and joins at Initiative 1. This Action may only be used if the creature has Size larger than 2. The created ooze never has rank superior to Normal.

Sundering Strike.name: Sundering Strike
Sundering Strike.description: You make a Strike with your mainhand weapon which, if successful, applies the Exposed condition to your target for 3 rounds. This attack is Difficult to perform and deals reduced damage.

Gloom Sight.name: Gloom Sight
Gloom Sight.description:
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} can gaze into the gloom of total darkness and see normally. Magical darkness does not impede the creature's vision.

System Development: This feature needs automation to configure vision and detection modes that are unaffected by magical darkness.

Teleport.name: Teleport
Teleport.description: The Creature teleports to a empty location within 120ft.

Teleport.name: Teleport
Teleport.description: The creature teleports to a empty location within 120ft

Horrifying Visage.name: Horrifying Visage
Horrifying Visage.description: The Creature wails targeting each creature in a 30ft cone. A creature hit by this is Confused for 1 minute.

Horrifying Visage.name: Horrifying Visage
Horrifying Visage.description: The Creature wails targeting each creature in a 30ft cone. A creature hit by this is Confused for 1 minute in addition to any damage dealt.

Swooping Strike.name: Swooping Strike
Swooping Strike.description:
This attack may be used after a Move which descended at least 10 feet towards the target. The attack gains +1 Boon per 10 feet of elevation decrease in that movement.

If this attack is a Critical Hit, the target of the attack is immediately knocked @Condition[prone].

Tail Sweep.name: Tail Sweep
Tail Sweep.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} sweeps its heavy tail in a circular arc, striking all creatures within range. On a Critical Hit, affected targets become @Condition[staggered] for until the end of their next turn.

Refocus.name: Refocus
Refocus.description:
You use your equipped Talisman to attempt to regain some Focus. You perform a Harmless Strike against your own Rallying threshold.

On a success you recover +1 Focus if using a one-handed Talisman and +2 Focus if using a two-handed Talisman. On a critical success the amount of Focus recovered increases by an additional +1.

Telecognition.name: Telecognition
Telecognition.description:
You reach into the mind of a Humanoid or Giant creature, attempting to penetrate their Willpower defense to understand their thoughts and motives. The target of this spell is aware of the intrusion, even if they cannot perceive you.

If successful, the Gamemaster (in the case of an Adversary target) or Player (in the case of a Hero target) must describe to you in 3 words or less what idea or sentiment is at the forefront of their thoughts in the current moment.

Upon a Critical Success, this description may use up to 10 words to convey deeper understanding.

Teleport.name: Teleport
Teleport.description: The creature teleports to a empty location within 120ft

Thrash.name: Thrash
Thrash.condition: The target is Restrained by this creature.
Thrash.description: The creature deals Deadly damage to a target that it currently has Restrained.

Gloom Sight.name: Gloom Sight
Gloom Sight.description:
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} can gaze into the gloom of total darkness and see normally. Magical darkness does not impede the creature's vision.

System Development: This feature needs automation to configure vision and detection modes that are unaffected by magical darkness.

Repugnant Pustules.name: Repugnant Pustules
Repugnant Pustules.description: A malodorous cloud hangs about this creature like a pall, the rank noxious scent that can only come from active decay. Striking this creature is likely to release repugnant and corrupting essence.

Repugnant Pustules.name: Repugnant Pustules
Repugnant Pustules.description:
When the @ref[actor.name]{creature} is hit by a Strike, it may partially burst to release a spray of sickening fluid that deals Corruption damage. This action scales with Toughness and targets the Reflex defense of any creature within 3 feet.

On a Critical Success, the affected target becomes temporarily @Condition[diseased] for 3 Rounds.

Trampling Charge.name: Trampling Charge
Trampling Charge.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} moves forward up to twice its Stride, attacking the Reflex defense of all creatures in its path. Targets who are half the creature's size or smaller are @Condition[stunned] until the end of their next turn as they are slammed aside.

Tree Stride.name: Tree Stride
Tree Stride.description: The Creature Steps from one tree within range 1 appearing next to another tree within 60ft of the first. Both trees must be larger than the the Creature.

Thick Skin.name: Thick Skin
Thick Skin.description: Your physical toughness makes you more resistant to harm. You gain +2 Resistance to Bludgeoning, Slashing, and Piercing damage.

Unshakeable Stance.name: Unshakeable Stance
Unshakeable Stance.description: You cannot be unvoluntarily Moved or knocked Prone by any action that is not a Critical Success rolled by an enemy or a Critical Failure rolled by yourself.

Trampling Charge.name: Trampling Charge
Trampling Charge.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} uses its prodigious size to charge forward, trampling smaller creatures that stand in its way.

Trampling Charge.name: Trampling Charge
Trampling Charge.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} moves forward up to twice its Stride, attacking the Reflex defense of all creatures in its path. Targets who are half the creature's size or smaller are @Condition[stunned] until the end of their next turn as they are slammed aside.

Restraining Chomp.name: Restraining Chomp
Restraining Chomp.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} uses its powerful jaws to bite and hold a target with a powerful chomp.

Restraining Chomp.name: Restraining Chomp
Restraining Chomp.description: The creature chomps down upon its target. If the attack is successful and the target is equal or lesser in Size, the target is also Restrained until this creature chooses to release it or the restraint is otherwise broken. Only one target may be restrained by this action at a given time.

Thrash.name: Thrash
Thrash.description: Once the @ref[actor.name]{creature} has an enemy restrained, it will thrash violently dealing terrible blows to the grasped victim.

Thrash.name: Thrash
Thrash.condition: The target is Restrained by this creature.
Thrash.description: The creature deals Deadly damage to a target that it currently has Restrained.

Uppercut.name: Uppercut
Uppercut.description: Following a basic Strike attack which did not critically miss, you Strike the same target again with the backswing of your weapon at reduced Action cost.

Venomous Bite.name: Venomous Bite
Venomous Bite.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} attacks, injects toxin which, if successful, inflicts the @Condition[poisoned] condition for 6 Turns.

Gloom Sight.name: Gloom Sight
Gloom Sight.description:
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} can gaze into the gloom of total darkness and see normally. Magical darkness does not impede the creature's vision.

System Development: This feature needs automation to configure vision and detection modes that are unaffected by magical darkness.

Stunning Screech.name: Stunning Screech
Stunning Screech.description: The Creature lets out a earsplitting screech that stuns opponents.

Stunning Screech.name: Stunning Screech
Stunning Screech.description: The Creature makes a harmless Toughness attack against the Willpower defense of every creature within 10ft that can hear them. Each creature that is hit becomes Stunned for 1 turn.

Spores.name: Spores
Spores.description: The creature creates a cloud of toxic spores.

Spores.name: Spores
Spores.description: The creature makes a Weakened attack against scaling with Toughness against all creatures in a 15ft Pulse targeting Fortitude and dealing the Poisoned condition for 3 turns on a hit.

Natural Weapon Training.name: Natural Weapon Training
Natural Weapon Training.description: You have a developed familiarity with using features of your own body as a natural weapons including claws, jaws, tails, or other mechanisms of self-defense. You are Trained with weapons in the Natural category.

Wild Strike.name: Wild Strike
Wild Strike.description: Immediately after you perform a basic Strike, you perform a reduced-cost follow-up Strike against the same target using a different Natural weapon that you have access to.

Flight.name: Flight
Flight.description: This creature gains a fly speed equal to its stride.

Wailing Moan.name: Wailing Moan
Wailing Moan.description: The Creature wails targeting each creature in a 30ft pulse. A creature hit by this is Confused for 1 minute in addition to any damage dealt.

Weakening Breath.name: Weakening Breath
Weakening Breath.description: The Dragon lets out a breath of gas that inflicts the Exhausted Condition on targets in a 10ft fan.

Web Spinner.name: Web Spinner
Web Spinner.description: The creature can spend 10 minutes to spin a new new section of webbing that covers a 5-foot area.

Flight.name: Flight
Flight.description: This creature gains a fly speed equal to its stride.

Ice Walk.name: Ice Walk
Ice Walk.description: Cryovain can move across and climb icy surfaces as if they were normal terrain

Frost Breath.name: Frost Breath
Frost Breath.description: The dragon breaths forth a breath of ice cold air freezing anything on contact.

Frost Breath.name: Frost Breath
Frost Breath.description:
The Dragon Breaths forth a breath of ice cold air in a 20ft cone.

On a Critical Hit, this attack causes the Freezing condition for 3 turns.

Wildspeak.name: Wildspeak
Wildspeak.description:
If you succeed on a [[/skillCheck wilderness 14]] check, you may pose simple questions to a Beast which can perceive you. As long as the creature is not hostile it will respond accurately within the limits of its own knowledge.

  • Beasts with an Intellect score of zero are incapable of understanding you.

  • Beasts with an Intellect score of 1 can only respond with "yes" or "no" responses.

  • Beasts with an Intellect score greater than 1 can provide simple multi-word responses.

Gloom Sight.name: Gloom Sight
Gloom Sight.description:
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} can gaze into the gloom of total darkness and see normally. Magical darkness does not impede the creature's vision.

System Development: This feature needs automation to configure vision and detection modes that are unaffected by magical darkness.

Flight.name: Flight
Flight.description: This creature gains a fly speed equal to its stride.

Raking Talons.name: Raking Talons
Raking Talons.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} attacks rapidly with its talons, dealing multiple raking blows against a single target.

Raking Talons.name: Raking Talons
Raking Talons.description:
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} attacks swiftly with both talons.

If at least one attack results in a Critical Success, it inflicts the @Condition[bleeding] condition for 2 Rounds.

Acid Breath.name: Acid Breath
Acid Breath.description: The creature has salivary glands which produce a caustic acidic spray.

Breath.name: Breath
Breath.description:
The creature expels a spray of acidic bile in a 30 foot line.

On a Critical Hit, this attack causes the @Condition[corroding] condition for 3 Turns.

Flight.name: Flight
Flight.description: This creature gains a fly speed equal to its stride.

Raking Talons.name: Raking Talons
Raking Talons.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} attacks rapidly with its talons, dealing multiple raking blows against a single target.

Raking Talons.name: Raking Talons
Raking Talons.description:
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} attacks swiftly with both talons.

Corruption Absorption.name: Corruption Absorption
Corruption Absorption.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} has an exceptional ability to shrug off the effects of Death magic. Its Corruption resistance is doubled and if that resistance would reduce an amount of damage below zero, the negative amount is received as Healing instead.

Rotting Breath.name: Rotting Breath
Rotting Breath.description: The Dragon Breaths out a blast of necrotic gas rotting targets on contact.

Rotting Breath.name: Rotting Breath
Rotting Breath.description: The dragon breaths forth a blast of rotting gas dealing corruption damage to targets in a 10ft fan. On a crit the target gains the Decaying Condition for 3 turns.

Restless Dead.name: Restless Dead
Restless Dead.description:
The @ref[actor.name]{creature}'s life is sustained by necromantic magic or otherworldly forces. When it would be considered @Condition[dead] it is instead @Condition[incapacitated].

After the conclusion of combat, the @ref[actor.name]{creature} may begin to perform the Recover action, regaining consciousness after the recovery is complete. Recovery in this fashion may be prevented in one of the following ways:

  • The creature was incapacitated by a type of damage for which it is Vulnerable.

  • The magical forces which caused it to rise as undead are disrupted, countered, or otherwise dispelled.

  • The creature's body is destroyed to a degree that it can no longer maintain its physical form.

Amphibious.name: Amphibious
Amphibious.description: This creature can breath underwater in addition to air.

Steam Breath.name: Steam Breath
Steam Breath.description: The Creature breaths forth a blast of scalding hot air in a 20ft fan.

Steam Breath.name: Steam Breath
Steam Breath.description:
The Creature breaths forth a blast of scalding hot air in a 20ft fan.

Reinforcement.name: Reinforcement
Reinforcement.description: Increase Armor defense by 1 for each Tier of this suffix.

Magical Sight.name: Magical Sight
Magical Sight.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} has otherworldly sight that makes it especially aware of dangers or opportunities. It gains +2 Boons to any Awareness check and can see @Condition[invisible] creatures.

Elusive Flight.name: Elusive Flight
Elusive Flight.description: This @ref[actor.name]{creature} is especially elusive while in flight, able to swoop in and out of combat without provoking any Disengagement. It can be engaged if it lands upon the ground and Disengagement may apply if it attempts to return to flight.

Flight.name: Flight
Flight.description: This creature gains a fly speed equal to its stride.

Bonded Mind.name: Bonded Mind
Bonded Mind.description: The mind of a @ref[actor.name]{creature} with this talent is inextricably bound to other members of its group. It is capable of instantaneous telepathic communication with any other @ref[actor.taxonomy.name]{creature of its taxonomy} within 60 feet.

Rune: Illusion.name: Rune: Illusion
Rune: Illusion.description:
The chaotic force of trickery and whimsy. The illusion rune governs magical manifestations of falsehood or misdirection.

The Illusion rune scales using Intellect, targets Willpower defense, and deals Psychic damage to Morale. It is opposed by the orderly rune of Illumination.

Seeming.name: Seeming
Seeming.description:
Your command of the Rune of Illusion allows you to fabricate perception in various simple ways and to manipulate shadow and light to create distraction or entertainment, producing one of the following effects:

  • Modify a single aspect of your own physical appearance. Such alterations might include adjusting the sound of your voice, changing the color of your eyes, gaining illusory horns, or appearing slightly taller or shorter. The alteration persists until you Rest or enact a different alteration and can be verified as illusory by physical inspection.

  • Manifest a convincing recreation of a short sound or single scent that you can clearly recall. The illusion originates from your position and lasts for 10 seconds. You can control the volume of the sound or odorousness of the scent to be perceptible up to a range of 60 feet or shorter.

  • Decouple your shadow from your form, specifically controlling its movements separately from your own. You can maintain this illusion as long as you do not perform any other action that consumes Focus.

Seeming may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Gesture: Influence.name: Gesture: Influence
Gesture: Influence.description:
You intensify the arcane power of a Rune into a concentrated direct contact which is generally a more powerful evolution of the basic Touch gesture.

The Influence gesture scales using Presence and targets a single adjacent creature. It deals 10 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 3 Action and 1 Focus.

Gesture: Fan.name: Gesture: Fan
Gesture: Fan.description:
You shape the essence of a Rune into a sweeping or splintered arc to strike multiple targets in close proximity.

The Fan gesture scales using Intellect and targets a 120 degree arc with 6 foot radius. It deals 6 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 3 Action and 1 Focus.

Invisibility.name: Invisibility
Invisibility.description: A sophisticated use of Illusory magic, the Invisibility spell allows the caster to wrap light and shadow around themselves like donning a cloak, reflecting the world about them as if they were not standing there. What person wouldn't believe it when their own eyes tell them that there is nothing to see?

Invisibility.name: Invisibility
Invisibility.description: You become @Condition[invisible] and cannot be detected using sight-based perception. You cannot be directly targeted by any action. This spell must be Maintained in order to remain in effect.

Repugnant Pustules.name: Repugnant Pustules
Repugnant Pustules.description: A malodorous cloud hangs about this creature like a pall, the rank noxious scent that can only come from active decay. Striking this creature is likely to release repugnant and corrupting essence.

Repugnant Pustules.name: Repugnant Pustules
Repugnant Pustules.description:
When the @ref[actor.name]{creature} is hit by a Strike, it may partially burst to release a spray of sickening fluid that deals Corruption damage. This action scales with Toughness and targets the Reflex defense of any creature within 3 feet.

On a Critical Success, the affected target becomes temporarily @Condition[diseased] for 3 Rounds.

Thick Skin.name: Thick Skin
Thick Skin.description: Your physical toughness makes you more resistant to harm. You gain +2 Resistance to Bludgeoning, Slashing, and Piercing damage.

taxonomy.name: Zombie
taxonomy.description: The shambling corpses of the restless dead, their still-rotting bodies bloated with putrescence. They move without regard for the wounds they sustain and seek only mindless consumption.
